* Currently pursuing or recently completed a B.S. or M.S. in Computer Science or a related technical field.
* Graduating in summer 2026, or 2027.
* Solid understanding of JavaScript or another modern programming language.
* Genuine curiosity, drive to learn, and an action-oriented attitude.



  





**We’d be impressed if you have** 



* Familiarity with React, Node.js, or similar modern frameworks.
* Experience from side projects, internships, or open source contributions.
* Exposure to CI/CD pipelines and version control with Git.
* A passion for the circular economy or sustainable tech.



  





**You get to** 



* Be part of a tech-minded company driving the change towards a sustainable lifestyle. In return, you'll get direction, energy, and meaningful challenges from day one.
* Enjoy a vibrant office culture at Medborgarplatsen, balanced with hands-on experience at our production sites
* Work with highly skilled and motivated colleagues who invest in your growth.
* Gain new skills with unlimited access to a learning platform.
* Make use of prepaid vacation.
* Enjoy Sellpy credits and staff discounts at Sellpy and the H&M brands (Arket, COS, Other Stories, Weekday and more).
* Save up with a monthly pension plan.
* Engage in Sellpy’s social traditions with game nights, interactive planning days, guest speakers and other activities.



  





**Location** 




 On-site collaboration at our core, supported by a flexible hybrid setup on set days. This role is based at our Medborgarplatsen office.
 



  





**Hybrid work** 




 We value being together. After an on-site onboarding, we aim for a balanced office presence, with flexibility on set days.
 



  





**Form of employment:** 
 Full-time
 



  





**Start:** 
 As agreed upon

title: Frontend Developer - Annonsmedia & CMS
description:
**Frontendutvecklare – AdTech, Annonsmedia, CMS** 




*IMIRSIVE® · Xiris Group · Stockholm · Heltid, tillsvidare* 




  





**Om IMIRSIVE®** 




 IMIRSIVE® bygger nästa generations interaktiva mobilannonsering. Vi förvandlar en statisk annonsyta till en app-lik varumärkesupplevelse direkt i annonsen – byggt på den realtidsbaserade MIRS™-tekniken inom Xiris Group. Vi gör om branschens displayformat och gör engagemang och tid till annonsens verkliga valuta.
 



  





**Om rollen** 




 Vi söker en frontendutvecklare som vill äga och driva frontend för våra annonsformat och vår self-service-plattform IMIRSIVE® Ad Studio. Du blir en nyckelperson när vi går från konsultativ leverans till en skalbar produkt – du bygger de gränssnitt och annonsupplevelser som kunder, byråer och publicister sedan använder själva. Rollen är ny och central; du sätter avtryck på både produkt och arkitektur i en snabbrörlig uppbyggnadsfas.
 



  





**Så hänger tekniken ihop:** 



* **MIRS™ (Xiris/UXStream):** 
 realtidsmotorn som kör och streamar interaktivt innehåll server-side till valfri enhet – utan nedladdningar eller viktbegränsningar.
* **Adorable / UXStream-portalen:** 
 den gemensamma backend- och infrastrukturplattformen – identitet, hosting, rendering, data och fakturering.
* **IMIRSIVE® Ad Studio:** 
 vårt IMIRSIVE-brandade ad-CMS ovanpå Adorable, där annonser skapas, publiceras, mäts och monetiseras (self-service).
* **Annonsformaten:** 
 lättviktiga webbappar (~35 kb script) som streamas och körs direkt i publicistens annonsyta.



  





**Dina ansvarsområden:** 



* Bygga och vidareutveckla frontend för IMIRSIVE® Ad Studio – mallbaserad annonsbyggare, live preview, drag-and-drop, deploy och export.
* Äga annonsformatens frontend – rendering, interaktionslogik, prestanda och mätning direkt i annonsytan.
* Integrera Ad Studio mot Adorable/UXStream-portalens funktioner: scriptgenerering, statistik, sessions, deploy och billing.
* Säkerställa IMIRSIVE-brandad UX, snabb laddning och stabil rendering på mobil.
* Bidra till arkitekturbeslut (tenant-strategi, publiceringsflöde, edge/serverless).
* Arbeta nära produktägaren, MIRS™-/UXStream-teamet och externa leverantörer.



  





**Teknisk miljö – språk & ramverk** 



* **Språk:** 
 TypeScript / JavaScript, HTML5, CSS3.
* **Frontend-ramverk:** 
 Svelte/Sveltkit
* **Plattform & infrastruktur:** 
 Cloudflare Pages och Workers, D1 (databas), R2 (lagring) – delar nära Adorable/UXStream-stacken.
* **Autentisering:** 
 Clerk (inkl. satellite domains).
* **CI/CD & publicering:** 
 GitHub Actions (på väg mot Cloudflare-native/event-driven); demo-hosting via concepts.imirsive.com (Azure).
* **Betalning (kommande):** 
 Eventuellt Stripe eller motsvarande.
* **AI-assisterad utveckling:** 
 vi använder Codex för att accelerera utvecklingen.
* **Mycket meriterande** 
 om du kan
 **Rust.**



  





**Vi söker dig som** 



* Har gedigen erfarenhet av frontendutveckling i TypeScript/JavaScript, Svelte mm.
* Behärskar HTML/CSS och bygger prestandaoptimerade, lättviktiga gränssnitt.
* Har vana vid REST/API-integrationer och komponentbaserad arkitektur.
* Är självgående, duktig på att prioritera, vara produktnära och trivs när tempot är högt.



  





**Meriterande** 



* **Ad tech:** 
 annonstaggar, ad servers, DSP:er, prebid, viewability och mätning.
* **Cloudflare (Pages/Workers/D1/R2)** 
 eller annan edge-/serverless-miljö.
* Erfarenhet av self-service-/SaaS-produkter och CMS-utveckling.
* Intresse för realtidsrendering/streaming och AI-assisterad utveckling.



  





**Praktiskt & ansökan** 



* **Placering:** 
 Stockholm (Storgatan 23C) – på plats/hybrid.
* **Omfattning:** 
 Heltid, tillsvidare. Start 1a september.
* **Team:** 
 IMIRSIVE®-teamet inom Xiris Group, i nära samarbete med UXStream.



  





**REKRYTERINGSBOLAG OCH KONSULTBOLAG SKA INTE HÖRA AV SIG, TACK!**

title: Fullstack Developer (Next.js/React) till RiseRank
description:
RiseRank befinner sig i en stark tillväxtresa och går från startup till scale up. Vi bygger högtrafikerade webbplattformar inom restaurang- och hospitalitybranschen och arbetar redan med hundratals verksamheter.
   

  

 Nu tar vi nästa steg och lanserar större plattformssatsningar, bland annat:
   

  

* riserank.com
* restauranger.se
* julbordsgruppen.se


 Vår ambition är tydlig: att bygga skalbara, SEO-drivna plattformar som kan konkurrera med de största marketing SaaS-bolagen i branschen.
   

  

 Det här är inte enklare webbplatser. Vi bygger storskaliga webbapplikationer designade för hög trafik, stora datamängder, avancerad filtrering och långsiktig teknisk skalbarhet.
   

  

 Vi söker nu en Full Stack Web Developer som blir vår andra utvecklare i teamet.
   

  

**Rollen:**
 Det här är en roll med stort tekniskt ägarskap och ansvar. Du kommer att vara med och sätta grunden för den tekniska riktningen framåt och arbeta nära grundaren och vår nuvarande utvecklare.
   

  

**I rollen kommer du att:**
* Designa och bygga skalbar systemarkitektur från grunden
* Forma den långsiktiga tekniska riktningen för våra plattformar
* Arbeta med både backend och frontend i produktionskritiska system
* Vara med och bygga upp framtida utvecklingsteam


**Arbetsområden**
* Design av skalbar arkitektur för högtrafikerade plattformar
* Backendlogik och databasstruktur med Supabase och PostgreSQL
* Autentisering och row level security
* API-utveckling och edge functions
* SEO-optimerade frontendapplikationer i Next.js
* SSR och static generation för stora mängder indexerbara sidor
* Cachingstrategier och prestandaoptimering
* Planering för stabilitet, skalbarhet och långsiktig teknisk hållbarhet


**Tech stack**
* Next.js
* React
* TypeScript
* Supabase (PostgreSQL, Auth, Storage, Edge Functions)


**Vi söker dig som**
* Har flera års erfarenhet av att bygga produktionssatta webbapplikationer
* Har byggt system från grunden, inte enbart förvaltat befintliga lösningar
* Förstår systemarkitektur och principer för skalbarhet
* Har stark backend- och databaskompetens
* Har god förståelse för PostgreSQL och prestandaoptimering
* Är bekväm med både backend och frontend
* Har förståelse för teknisk SEO och performance
* Är trygg i att ta tekniskt ledarskap i ett mindre team
* Gillar att mentorera och bidra till en hög teknisk nivå


**Om RiseRank**
 RiseRank är en snabbväxande scaleup inom lokal SEO och digital synlighet. Vi hjälper företag att synas bättre online genom smart teknik, tydliga produkter och stark digital närvaro.
   

  

 Bolaget växer snabbt och befinner sig i en expansiv fas med tydliga tillväxtmål, både i Sverige och internationellt. Vi bygger nu plattformar som ska kunna skala över flera marknader och vara en långsiktig teknisk grund för vår fortsatta expansion.
   

  

 RiseRank är en del av Blackfish, en koncern med flera bolag inom försäljning, digital marknadsföring och SaaS. Gemensamt för oss är ett högt tempo, entreprenörsdriv och en stark kultur där vi bygger långsiktigt.
   

  

**Ansök med CV samt portfolio eller GitHub** 
**på tidigare projekt (om tillgängligt).**
**Vid frågor kring tjänsten är du välkommen att kontakta vår rekryteringskonsult Emmy Zachrisson via mail:** 
**emmy@riserank.se**

title: Fullstack Developer
description:
**Expleo** 
 is seeking a highly skilled and experienced
 **Fullstack Developer** 
 to join our team in
 **Sweden** 
 (located in Gothenburg OR Stockholm).
   

  

 Our
 **ideal** 
 candidate has an always-on mindset with a strong background in designing, configuring, and managing solutions for devices, tools, and applications in a factory/corporate setting.
   

  

 If you are a full-stack engineer looking to expand your skill set, we'd love to hear from you. Join our team today and take the next step in your career!
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Understand and reflect on the customer needs to bring value to the organization.
* Take part in the development cycle using innovative technologies and frameworks.
* Secure qualitative, efficient and performance deliveries.
* Provide input for the design and construction of test cases and scenarios and help validate executed test results.
* Contribute to boosting the team to continually increase knowledge, competence, performance, and innovation
* Collaborate with suppliers, architects, engineers, developers, and internal stakeholders on upcoming and innovative technologies and standardization.
* Collaborate with the local IT site teams for problem/opportunity analysis.


**Qualifications**
* Hold a bachelor’s degree in information technology, Computer Science or equivalent experience in a relevant field.
* Knowledge and experience in agile development practices, ITIL (incident, problem & change process), collaboration tools (such as Azure DevOps or similar)
* Java development & support, relational databases (Oracle, SQL server, My SQL).
* Eager to learn and grow (yourself and the company) using a modern approach to Software Engineering.
* Ability to work under rapidly changing conditions and have the capability to identify, mitigate and decide on solutions when facing obstacles.
* You are fluent in English, both verbally and written.
* You should have a general understanding of production processes and understand how all these things work together to make end user applications work well.
* Knowledge of the automotive industry is meritorious.


**Experience**
* Knowledge about databases (MS SQL (Azure))
* Development platforms (Java, OpenShift, ...)
* Azure Cloud (App services, AKS Azure Kubernetes Cluster)
* SQL server for database
* Azure Storage, Azure Container Services
* Frameworks (Spring, Springboot, WebFlux, ...)
* Messaging (MQ, Kafka, REST API, ...)
* Front-end (Angular)
* Test Driven Development (Unit testing in Spring Boot and Angular, in memory database testing using Mockito)
* Agile processes (Safe / Scrum / ADO) but also about backlog management, strategic planning, business relationship management, problem analysis and business modelling.
* Bonus points for having relevant experience using docker containers and orchestration with Kubernetes.


**Benefits**
**Who are we?**
 Expleo is a rapidly growing consulting company dedicated to delivering innovative solutions in the fields of AI engineering, digitalization, hyper-automation, cybersecurity, and data science. With a strong commitment to integrity, diversity, sustainability, and societal security, Expleo is at the forefront of creating a better future. Join our dynamic team and be part of our journey to shape the future of technology and business.
   

  

**What do we offer?**
* Collaborative working environment – we stand shoulder to shoulder with our clients and our peers through good times and challenges
* We empower all passionate technology loving professionals by allowing them to expand their skills and take part in inspiring projects
* Expleo Academy - enables you to acquire and develop the right skills by delivering a suite of accredited training courses
* Always working as one team, our people are not afraid to think big and challenge the status quo
* Collective agreement with the union
* Access to a collection of benefits and discounted prices on services and shops.
* Health benefits
* Expleo team activities


 "We are an equal opportunities employer and welcome applications from all suitably qualified persons regardless of their race, sex, disability, religion/belief, sexual orientation or age ”.

title: Senior Software Engineer Backend
description:
**Join Truecaller – The place where innovation meets impact!** 




  





 Truecaller's mission is to build trust in communication by making it safer, smarter, and more efficient. Born in Sweden, trusted by the world, and here’s why we stand out:
 


* We are trusted by over 450 million active users every month across 190+ countries
* We identify over 15 billion calls daily, helping users avoid spam and scams
* We are powered by a team of 450+ employees from 45+ nationalities



  





 We always look for people who take initiative, own their work, and keep raising the bar. An entrepreneurial mindset matters here, especially when it turns bold ideas into real actions. We stay collaborative and focused, always searching for smarter paths forward. If you want to make an impact and grow with a team that inspires millions, you’ll fit right in.
 



  





**The role:** 




 As a Senior Software Engineer, Backend, you will leverage your deep technical expertise to ensure alignment, quality, and long-term maintainability across the organization. You will be building strong relationships with cross-functional stakeholders, driving project delivery, and ensuring our backend infrastructure remains scalable and robust enough to support millions of users worldwide.
 



  





**What you will do** 



* Design and develop high-volume, low-latency services and cope with the challenge of working in a distributed environment.
* Operate mission-critical services at high availability.
* Collaborate across business units and drive solutions.
* Explore new solutions and technologies.
* Build a scalable and reliable system.



  





**What you bring in:** 



* 5+ years of experience with Scala, Java, or Go
* Experience of working with scalable, highly available, real-time distributed systems
* Experience of working with non-relational databases
* Good understanding of data structures and algorithms
* Mentoring/ Leadership skills
* Excellent communication skills in English.
* Ability to thrive in a dynamic, fast-paced environment.



  





**It would be great if you also have:** 



* Experience building systems in the Google Cloud Platform
* Experience with virtualization environments, e.g., Docker
* Experience with systems for managing containerized applications, e.g., Kubernetes
* Experience with Cassandra and Kafka.



 .
 



**What we offer:** 




 We support growth through learning resources, leadership programs, mentoring, and real hands-on work. People can move between teams and projects to build new skills and keep things interesting. We offer clear internal mobility and a transparent path for progression, with leaders who stay involved and provide guidance throughout the year. In addition, you will benefit from:
 








* **A comprehensive compensation package:** 
 We offer a competitive salary, 30 days of paid vacation, private health insurance, parental leave top-up, pension, and wellness contributions.
* **Modern tools to do your best work:** 
 Choose your preferred computer and phone within our budget, so you can work comfortably and efficiently.
* **A people-focused office culture:** 
 We value in-person collaboration and follow an office-first model, with some flexibility. Our offices offer a vibrant environment with opportunities to learn, connect, and recharge, from breakfast, lunch, and well-stocked snack stations and quiet spaces to team activities such as movie nights, tech meetups, and cultural events. There's something for everyone.
* **Truecaller’s “Lab Days” offer a space for imagination:** 
 5 times per year for 3 days, where everyone steps away from their normal tasks to explore new, bold ideas and build things they’ve always wanted to. It’s a space where curiosity leads the way, and prototypes take shape. Some concepts even make it into production, and a few have grown into real features used by millions today. Lab Days allow you to be creative, learn fast, and help shape Truecaller's future.



  





**Come as you are:** 




 Truecaller is committed to building a diverse and inclusive team. We believe that a wide range of backgrounds, perspectives, and experiences strengthens our products and our culture. No matter where you're from, what language you speak, or how you identify, we value what makes you unique and would love to get to know you.
 




  





 Check out Life at Truecaller - Behind the code: https://www.instagram.com/lifeattruecaller/
 



  





**Sounds like a great opportunity?** 




  





 We will fill the position as soon as we find the right candidate, so please send your application as soon as possible. As part of the recruitment process, we will conduct a background check.
 



  





**We only accept applications in English.**

title: Founding Engineer
description:
**Senior Backend Engineer** 




  





 Looking for an exceptional backend engineer to own the systems, infrastructure, and platform that power a fast-growing AI product used by teams every day. This is a role for engineers who care deeply about performance, scalability, reliability, and clean architecture.
 



  





**You'll thrive if you:** 



* Have built and scaled production backend systems
* Have deep experience with databases, distributed systems, and infrastructure
* Enjoy solving performance bottlenecks and complex technical problems
* Think in systems, not just features
* Have strong product instincts and care about customer outcomes
* Use AI-assisted development tools as part of your daily workflow
* Take ownership from problem discovery through to production



  





**You'll work on:** 



* High-scale backend services
* Database architecture and optimisation
* Retrieval and search infrastructure
* Event-driven systems
* Third-party integrations
* Reliability and observability
* Billing, authentication, and platform services
* AI product infrastructure



  





**Ideal experience:** 



* Ruby, TypeScript, Python, Go, Java, or similar
* PostgreSQL at scale
* Background jobs and asynchronous systems
* API design and integrations
* Performance tuning and system optimisation
* Cloud infrastructure and modern developer tooling



  





**Why join?** 




 You'll join a small team of highly capable engineers building technology at the frontier of AI applications. High ownership. Real technical challenges. Direct impact on product and customers.

title: Software Engineer - Internal Tooling
description:
Build something monumental for Healthcare!
   

  

 At Tandem Health we’re reimagining healthcare by putting clinicians first. Our platform - designed by clinicians, for clinicians - is built on deep insight into real-world pain points, with intuitive medical notes and workflows that truly support patient care.
   

  

 We’re a fast-scaling health-tech company backed by top investors and expanding globally. We move fast, stay curious, and believe building something that matters starts with an extraordinary team. If you're passionate about impact and innovation, we'd love to meet you!
   

  

**About The Role**
 You care about making systems work where it really matters, behind the scenes, where complexity tends to hide. At your previous role, you were likely drawn to problems that others avoided: messy logic, unclear ownership, and workflows that didn’t quite hold together. You enjoy bringing structure to that - building systems that are not just functional, but reliable and easy to reason about.
   

  

 At Tandem, you’ll work at the intersection of product, operations, and business logic, owning and building the internal systems that power how we operate at scale. A key focus for this role is
 **billing and invoicing** 
 , where product usage, access, and real-world workflows need to translate into correct, auditable invoices.
   

  

 This is not just about payments, it’s about deeply understanding how our product is used in practice, how that maps to our business model, and building the systems that make it all work seamlessly. You’ll work closely with engineering, operations, and commercial teams to ensure that what we build internally is robust, scalable, and aligned with how Tandem grows.
   

  

 If you enjoy working close to the business, taking ownership of complex logic, and building systems that directly impact how a company runs - this is your kind of role.
   

  

 What You Will Do
   

  

* Own and build Tandem’s internal tooling and operational systems, with a primary focus on billing and invoicing.
* Design and implement systems that connect product usage and access control to invoicing logic (e.g. integrations with Stripe).
* Build workflows that ensure invoices are generated correctly based on real-world product behavior and customer setups.
* Develop and maintain integrations between internal systems, databases, and external platforms (e.g. billing, CRM, analytics).
* Work closely with operations and commercial teams to understand business needs and translate them into robust technical solutions.
* Improve and automate internal processes to reduce manual work and increase reliability.
* Build internal APIs and services that support operational workflows and scale with the company.
* Take end-to-end ownership, from problem definition and system design to implementation, monitoring, and iteration.


 What You Bring
   

  

* Experience as a software engineer working on backend systems or internal tooling.
* Strong ability to model and implement business logic in code, especially in complex or evolving domains.
* Experience working with APIs, integrations, and data flows between systems.
* Familiarity with cloud environments (e.g. AWS, Azure, or similar).
* A pragmatic mindset - you focus on building systems that actually work in practice.
* Interest in working close to the business and understanding how technical systems map to real-world operations.
* Strong ownership and the ability to drive work independently in a fast-moving environment.


 Bonus Points
   

  

* Experience working with billing, invoicing, or financial systems (e.g. Stripe or similar platforms).
* Experience building internal tools or backoffice systems.
* Familiarity with data modeling for usage-based systems.
* Experience applying automation or AI to operational workflows
* Experience in regulated environments (healthcare, fintech, etc.).


**Location**
 We believe the best ideas happen when we’re together. This role is based in our vibrant HQ in the Epicenter building in the heart of Stockholm where you will work primarily from our office to collaborate, connect, and build our culture.
   

  

**How To Apply**
 We adopt a continuous selection process, so please make sure to apply with your CV in English.
   

  

**Our Interview Process Consists Of 4 Stages**
* Screening interview with Talent Acquisition
* Technical interview with some of our Engineers
* Interview with our CTO & Co-Founder
* Home case and presentation at our office - Join us in the Stockholm office for a lunch, and a presentation to experience our our culture firsthand, collaborate with our team, and see how you work in action.


**Benefits**
* Competitive salary & company stock options
* 30 days/year of paid vacation
* Pension
* 5,000 SEK wellness allowance (friskvårdsbidrag)
* Social and team-building activities (off-sites, after works, winter/summer parties)
* An opportunity to make a real positive impact in the world of healthcare
* Work with some of the best minds in AI, healthcare, and engineering.


 Culture at Tandem
   

  

 At Tandem, we move fast, think big, and take ownership. We're a high-performing, diverse team with a shared drive to change the future of healthcare - and we’re just getting started.
   

  

 Our culture is built on action, ambition, and learning. You'll be trusted to take the lead, challenge yourself, and make an impact from day one. We believe real growth happens when you're stretched, supported, and surrounded by smart, passionate teammates who want to win together.
   

  

 Even though we’re spread across countries, we come together often in Sweden for team meetings, social events, and offsites - blending global reach with real human connection.
   

  

 We hire for talent, potential, and attitude - valuing different backgrounds and fresh perspectives. Great ideas come from everywhere, and we’re building a team that reflects the world we want to change.
   

  

*Tandem handles sensitive patient data and will conduct a background check before hiring any candidate.*

title: Software Technical Lead
description:
**Platform Tech Lead / C# Lead Developer – Greenfield Exchange Infrastructure** 




**Stockholm or Bucharest | Up to €240,000 base + up to 25% bonus + generous stock options** 




  





 I’m working on a confidential senior technology search for a next-generation exchange platform being built from the ground up.
 



  





 This is a rare opportunity for a hands-on technical leader to own the architecture and technical foundation of a new financial/crypto exchange, leading the design and build of core platform components across backend, infrastructure and data layers.
 



  





 The role can be remote for the first 3 months, with expected relocation to either Stockholm or Bucharest after that.
 



  





**What you’ll be doing:** 



* Owning the technical architecture of a greenfield exchange platform
* Leading and mentoring the engineering team while remaining hands-on
* Designing high-performance, low-latency, high-throughput systems
* Defining engineering standards across backend, infrastructure and data
* Building core components where correctness, resilience and speed are critical
* Making key technical decisions around scalability, concurrency, reliability, databases and caching



  





**What we’re looking for:** 



* 10+ years’ experience in backend, platform or infrastructure engineering
* Strong C# / .NET / ASP.NET Core experience
* Proven experience designing distributed systems at scale
* Deep understanding of high-performance architecture, concurrency and reliability
* Strong SQL, database and caching knowledge
* Experience working on financial systems, trading platforms or real-time systems



  





**Most importantly:** 




 You must have experience building, creating or developing a financial exchange, crypto exchange, trading venue or core exchange infrastructure.
 



 This could include areas such as matching engines, order books, market data, trading engines, exchange connectivity, clearing, settlement, risk or other critical components of an exchange platform.
 



  





 This is not a maintenance role. It is a chance to shape the technical foundations of a new platform from day one, with significant ownership, senior compensation and long-term upside.
 



 Please reach out confidentially if this sounds relevant, or feel free to share with someone who has built exchange technology before.

title: Senior Software Engineer
description:
Senior Software Engineer - Backend Architecture & AI Systems
   

  

**About Greenely**
 Greenely is on a mission to make energy smarter, greener, and more accessible. We build technology that helps households understand, optimize, and reduce their energy usage - contributing to a more sustainable future.
   

  

 Our products sit at the intersection of real-time data, consumer experience, and energy infrastructure. That means the engineering challenges we tackle are both complex and impactful.
   

  

 The role
   

  

 We’re looking for a Senior Software Engineer who thinks beyond tickets and implementations - someone who naturally leans into architecture, system design, and long-term technical direction.
   

  

 This role is not about writing the most code. It’s about making the right technical decisions, shaping systems that scale, and guiding how we build - especially as we explore AI-driven and agentic systems within our platform.
   

  

 You’ll work closely with product, data, and other engineers to design robust solutions where tradeoffs are real, constraints matter, and decisions have lasting impact.
   

  

 What you’ll do
   

  

* Own and drive architecture decisions across services and systems
* Design systems that are scalable, resilient, and cost-aware
* Act as a technical sounding board for engineers across teams
* Work hands-on when needed, but focus on direction over volume
* Evaluate and introduce patterns for AI agents and automation workflows
* Identify bottlenecks and proactively improve system performance and reliability
* Balance speed vs. quality, short-term delivery vs. long-term sustainability


 Who you are
   

  

 You bring a senior mindset - you’ve seen things break, scaled systems, and understand why “best practices” are often context-dependent.
   

  

**You Likely**
* Have extensive experience designing and building systems in the cloud (AWS preferred)
* Understand caching strategies, databases, and distributed systems - and their tradeoffs
* Have worked with real production systems where performance, cost, and reliability mattered
* Have experienced failure modes (and learned from them)
* Think in systems, not just services
* Integrate AI agents and automation into your daily workflows to drive tangible impact on delivery
* Prefer ownership and agency over rigid processes


 Technical depth we value
   

  

 We don’t expect everything, but strong experience in several of:
   

  

* Cloud architecture & infrastructure design
* Designing and building robust distributed systems, distributed business transactions, and stateless compute pipelines
* Data storage (SQL/NoSQL), caching layers (Redis, etc.)
* Observability, monitoring, and debugging production systems
* Performance optimization and cost efficiency
* Event-driven systems and asynchronous workflows
* AI/ML systems and agent-based tooling
* Experience working with data and streaming pipelines, Kafka / Spark, etc


 How you work
   

  

* You take initiative and move problems forward without waiting for permission
* You ask “why” before jumping to solutions
* You’ve built enough to know that tradeoffs > perfection
* You communicate clearly with both engineers and non-engineers
* You care about building things that actually work - in production, over time


 Why Greenely
   

  

* Work on real-world problems tied to energy, sustainability, and climate impact
* Be part of a team where engineering decisions matter
* High ownership, low bureaucracy
* A culture that values pragmatism, curiosity, and continuous improvement


 If you’re the kind of engineer who naturally steps back to see the bigger picture - and then steps in to shape it - we’d like to talk.
   

  

**Start date:** 
 Asap
   

  

**Location:** 
 Stockholm, Sweden (on-site, with 1 day/week remote flexibility)
   

  

*Please note that we do not accept applications via email as we protect your privacy. We kindly request that agencies refrain from contacting us regarding this position as we do all recruitment in-house. Thank you for your understanding.*
 We enable every home to control, optimize and earn from its energy automatically — lowering costs while strengthening the transition to a more sustainable power system.

title: Senior GIS Software Engineer (.NET & JavaScript)
description:
**Start:** 
 According to agreement
   

  

**Duration:** 
 Long term. 12 months initially with good possibility for extension for the right candidate
   

  

**Location:** 
 Remote, office in Stockholm
   

  

 We are now looking for a
 **Senior GIS Software Engineer within .NET and JavaScript** 
 to one of our clients. They are a profitable and fast-growing technology company developing a leading SaaS platform for managing large-scale infrastructure construction projects. Their solution helps customers digitize the entire project lifecycle; from field data collection and progress tracking to documentation, approvals, and reporting.
   

  

 As a
 **Senior GIS Software Engineer,** 
 you will play a key role in the continued development of our clients mapping and GIS capabilities. You'll work closely with the Product Owner, CTO, and development team to enhance existing functionality and build new integrations with external GIS platforms.
   

  

**Technologies You Will Work With**
* ASP.NET Web Forms and ASP.NET Web API on .NET Framework 4.8
* VB.NET as the primary backend language
* SQL Server and LINQ to SQL
* TypeScript, JavaScript, HTML, and CSS
* Google Maps JavaScript API, map layers, markers, clustering, drawing tools, and geometry handling
* GDAL/OGR, GeoJSON, KML/KMZ, and other geospatial data formats
* WMS, WMTS, WFS, XYZ tiles, ArcGIS REST Server, and Vetro FiberMap
* REST/JSON integrations, webhooks, and third-party APIs


**Your responsibilities**
* Develop and enhance interactive mapping functionality for large-scale infrastructure and construction projects.
* Build and maintain integrations with GIS platforms and mapping services such as ArcGIS REST Server, Vetro FiberMap, WMS, WMTS, WFS, and XYZ tile layers.
* Work with geospatial data formats and GIS data management, including GeoJSON, KML/KMZ, coordinates, lines, polygons, and project boundaries.
* Develop backend functionality using VB.NET/.NET Framework 4.8, ASP.NET Web Forms, ASP.NET Web API, and JSON-based APIs.
* Develop frontend functionality using TypeScript and JavaScript with the Google Maps JavaScript API.
* Work with SQL Server, LINQ to SQL, and data models for projects, maps, and system integrations.
* Analyze, troubleshoot, and improve existing GIS workflows, import/export functionality, webhooks, and system synchronizations.
* Contribute to code reviews, technical decisions, documentation, and knowledge sharing within the team.


 This is a
 **long term assignment** 
 , where the end goal is to be recruited by our client after the initial 12 months - as long as everybody is happy with the collaboration.
   

  

**Job Requirements**
 We are looking for someone who:
   

  

* Has several years of experience in software development and a strong interest in GIS, mapping, and geospatial technologies.
* Has hands-on experience with GIS platforms, mapping services, coordinate systems, vector and raster data, or geospatial data formats.
* Is confident in backend development with .NET (preferably VB.NET or C#) and SQL Server.
* Has experience with web development using JavaScript and/or TypeScript.
* Enjoys working with and evolving a mature software product with an established codebase, long-term customers, and a proven track record.
* Is comfortable analyzing complex workflows, troubleshooting integrations, and developing robust, maintainable solutions.
* Is a collaborative team player who enjoys sharing knowledge and contributing to high-quality, sustainable software development.


 It's not a must, but a plus if you also have experience with:
   

  

* ArcGIS, Vetro FiberMap, QGIS, PostGIS, or other GIS platforms.
* WMS, WMTS, WFS, XYZ tiles, Tile Map Service, geofencing, or spatial filtering.
* GDAL/OGR, geospatial data conversion, import/export, or coordinate transformations.
* Google Maps JavaScript API, marker clustering, drawing tools, and custom overlays.
* Webhooks, system synchronization, and third-party API integrations.
* ASP.NET Web Forms, legacy application modernization, or large-scale SaaS products with a substantial active user base.
* Code reviews, CI/CD, Azure Pipelines, and working in distributed development teams.


**Application procedure**
 A Maandag® recruiter will assess your application as soon as possible to determine whether you are suitable for an open position.
   

  

**About The Company**
 If you are a good match, we would like to receive a CV in WORD format with motivation why you fit this assignment, your availability and any scheduled holidays.
   

  

 Why Maandag Nordic? With us, you’ll get the chance to really put your ideas into action. We offer a work environment where you can grow and learn through hands-on experience - trying things out, making mistakes, and improving.
   

  

 For more than 35 years, Maandag® has been at the forefront of empowering people and organisations. We not only help professionals get jobs, but also connect them with a future that matches their values, desires and ambitions. Because when people are truly in the right place, they can develop themselves, fulfil their dreams and go to work with fresh energy every day. The energy and power released in the process is a catalyst for growth for companies. We started in the Netherlands, but now we also help professionals and organisations in Belgium, Poland, Dubai and Sweden. Our extensive knowledge of different markets, coupled with our wide network, enables us to make perfect matches quickly.

title: Technical Product Manager
description:
*We are Strawberry. With over 245 hotels, 120 restaurants, 20 spas and more, we create thousands of experiences every day. With urban Comfort Hotel®, warm Quality Hotel™, stylish Clarion Hotel® and cosy Home Hotel and more than 40 unique independent hotels, our guests can pick and choose. Our team of 20,000 passionate individuals from more than 120 countries is what makes us grow! Strawberry is built on our core values: energy, courage and enthusiasm.*




**Technical Product Manager – ConnectHub**




 We are looking for a Technical Product Manager to ConnectHub: Strawberry’s API and integration catalogue — the core platform enabling reusable APIs, standardized integration patterns and shared platform capabilities across our entire portfolio. It provides a scalable foundation supporting our websites and apps, while enabling integrations with partners, OTAs, AI agents and future machine-to-machine ecosystems.
   

  





 As Technical Product Manager for ConnectHub, you will evolve our API catalogue into a mature, reliable platform — the technical foundation enabling Strawberry's distribution strategy across digital channels, partners, and AI agents. As the way guests discover and book hotels and experiences shifts rapidly, you'll ensure we're ready for an agent-to-agent future.
   

  





 This is a role for someone who's equally comfortable in the technical details and the strategic picture — and who gets excited about building the kind of platform other teams depend on.
   

  





 This permanent role is based on-site at our Stockholm HQ.
   

  





**What you'll do:**




 Define Product Strategy: Establish the product strategy, vision, and roadmap, ensuring alignment with business objectives while maintaining a focus on delivering high-impact use cases.
   

  





 Strengthen Foundation & Governance: Together with the team to define and execute the governance model, onboarding key internal product teams onto generic APIs and the caching layer while ensuring the catalogue is performing, is documented, and highly reliable.
   

  





 Drive AI Readiness & Distribution: Ensure ConnectHub provides standardized APIs, metadata and context required for AI agents, MCP servers and emerging machine-to-machine integrations, enabling Strawberry’s digital products and commercial channels.  
   

  





 Lead Discovery & Prioritisation: Drive structured discovery across the portfolio, identifying and prioritizing critical improvements that range from platform stability, scalability, and data quality to new commercial opportunities. Work cross-functionally with engineering, product teams, and commercial stakeholders to align the ConnectHub roadmap with wider business needs. Proactively map and manage technical dependencies by understanding what other product teams need from the platform and when. 
   

  





 Measure & Report Success: Drive all initiatives with a strong focus on clear, tangible outcomes, including platform adoption, performance, developer efficiency, and overall commercial impact. Establish and track key performance indicators (KPIs) to drive continuous improvement. Measure, analyze, and report on platform outcomes and overall product success.
   

  





 Collaboration Structures: Establish the formal collaboration structures, processes, and ways of working required to run a shared, scalable, and highly efficient platform. Collaborate daily across engineering, product, and commercial boundaries, running structured product discovery for both internal developer consumers and external distribution partners.
   

  





 Commit to Experimentation-First: Maintain an experimentation-first mindset to continuously test, validate, and scale new technical solutions and platform features.
   

  





 Apply Hands-on AI Tools: Work actively with modern AI tools on a daily basis to build, prototype, and solve complex platform problems.
   

  





 Execution. You work shoulder-to-shoulder together with the team of engineers throughout delivery as part of the product team. You ask the right questions, evaluate feasibility, and keep the team oriented around the right problem.
   

  





**Qualifications:** 



* Platform & API Product Management: Proven experience owning platform or API products where your primary customers are other internal product teams. Deep knowledge of API-led connectivity, integration logic separation, and caching architectures.
* Technical Fluency: Comfortably engage with engineering teams on architecture decisions, data layering, integration patterns, and platform trade-offs.
* AI Distribution Knowledge: Working familiarity with the emerging AI landscape, including agentic workflows, A2A (agent-to-agent) protocols, and how LLMs interact with APIs. Understanding of how MCP servers and connectors work in practice is highly valued.
* Hands-on Experimentation: Experience actively building or prototyping with modern AI tools (e.g., Cursor, Claude, or similar).
* Stakeholder Management: Exceptional capability navigating complex stakeholder environments, balancing long-term technical investments with immediate commercial needs, and translating platform metrics into business value.
* Product Fundamentals: Strong background in agile frameworks, structured product discovery, and setting/tracking KPIs for platform products where value is indirect and distributed.



**What we offer:** 



* Real Impact & Empowerment: Play a central role in a dynamic digital transformation within a flat organization built on trust, autonomy, and room to make a real difference.
* Growth & Community: Continuous professional development opportunities to advance your career , combined with a vibrant, social, and inclusive team environment.
* Fantastic Perks: Excellent employee discounts, including steep staff, friends, and family rates at our hotels.
* Flexible Work Model: A hybrid working structure featuring three days of in-person collaboration at our Stockholm or Oslo HQ, giving you the best of both worlds.



**Details:**




 You will report to the Head of Tech Product. For this position, your base will be in Stockholm. Strawberry applies a 3-day office presence policy. While there is some flexibility for hybrid solutions, this role requires a strong, consistent physical presence in Stockholm. 
   

  





**About us:**




 We are Strawberry. With over 245 hotels, 120 restaurants, 20 spas and more, we create thousands of experiences every day. Our team of 20,000 passionate individuals from more than 166 countries is what makes us grow! Strawberry is built on our core values: energy, courage and enthusiasm.
   

  





**Ready to start an exciting journey with Strawberry?**




 Apply today and be part of creating unforgettable experiences!
   

 Applications are reviewed continuously, and positions may be filled before the deadline. Interviews are conducted on an ongoing basis.

title: Software Engineer inom Data Engineering & Analytics till Axfood IT, Stockholm
description:
**Samtliga ansökningar behandlas under augusti 2026, i samband med rekryteringsprocessens start.**
 Välkommen till Axfood IT, en av matbranschens största IT-avdelningar med nästan 400 medarbetare. Det är vi som ser till att Axfood, och alla våra kedjor, kan ligga i framkant vad gäller digital utveckling. Vi jobbar med att utveckla och förbättra allt ifrån e-handel till logistiklösningar och AI.
   

  

 Hos Axfood IT blir du del av ett sammanhang som utmanar och levererar lösningar som gör skillnad, både för våra kollegor och våra kunder. Här finns det alltid möjlighet att lära sig om ny teknik och växa, både som individ och tillsammans med kollegorna.
   

  

**Ditt nya team**
 Du blir en del av avdelningen Business Analytics på Axfood IT, som ansvarar för data, rapportering och analyslösningar för hela Axfoodkoncernen. Avdelningen arbetar nära både verksamheten och andra teknikteam och ansvarar för lösningar som används för att fatta viktiga affärsbeslut inom koncernen.
   

  

 Rollen har fokus på back-end utveckling och du arbetar med data pipelines, dataplattformar och integrationer i en miljö där många olika datakällor och verksamhetsbehov möts. Teamet arbetar både med vidareutveckling, förvaltning och projekt i varierande omfattning.
   

  

 Du samarbetar nära utvecklare, arkitekter och verksamheten, samtidigt som du blir en del av ett område där AI, data och modern analys utvecklas snabbt.
   

  

**Om rollen**
 Som Software Engineer kommer du att arbeta med allt ifrån att ta emot verksamhetskrav till att leverera hållbara tekniska lösningar i vår dataplattform. Du arbetar med krav från både verksamheten och projekt, samtidigt som du är delaktig i förvaltning och löpande förbättringar av befintliga lösningar. Arbetet sker i nära samarbete med andra i teamet så som andra delar av organisationen.
   

  

**Dina arbetsuppgifter kommer bland annat att inkludera:**
* Delta i refinement och tekniska dialoger för att omsätta verksamhetskrav till välgenomtänkta lösningsförslag
* Hämta och integrera data från källsystem via vår AWS-baserade dataplattform
* Transformera data till strukturerade analytiska modeller i dbt
* Utveckla lösningar i SQL och Python, med fokus på datastrukturering, modellering och prestanda
* Skapa och förvalta datapipelines i Apache Airflow
* Peer-reviewa och testa kod från andra teammedlemmar innan leverans
* Använda Git och Bitbucket för versionshantering och samarbete, samt bidra till att underhålla CI/CD-pipelines
* Lösa incidenter och arbeta med förvaltning av befintliga lösningar
* Samarbeta nära arkitekter, andra utvecklare och verksamhet


**Stämmer detta in på dig?**
 För att trivas i rollen tror vi att du har mångårig erfarenhet av back-end utveckling i ett Business Intelligence eller Business Analytics relaterat team och är van att arbeta med dataintensiva lösningar.
   

  

**Vi tror också att du har:**
* Erfarenhet av back-end utveckling inom SQL och Python
* Erfarenhet av AWS, Airflow och dbt
* Erfarenhet av Git, Bitbucket och CI/CD-pipelines
* Erfarenhet av data pipelines och dataplattformar
* Erfarenhet av stora datamängder
* Förståelse för semantiska lager, datastrukturering och datamodellering
* Kunskap om data governance och vikten av datakvalitet
* Erfarenhet av att samarbeta nära både verksamhet och i tekniska sammanhang
* Meriterande om du har erfarenhet från detaljhandeln
* Gillar att jobba i team
* Mycket god kommunikativ och analytisk förmåga, på både svenska och engelska


 Stämmer du inte in på varje punkt? Sök ändå! Vi vet att potential ofta är viktigare än erfarenhet och går igenom alla ansökningar.
   

  

**Ansökningsprocessen**
**Ansökan till denna roll ligger ute över sommaren, men ansökningar kommer bahandlas först i augusti. Du är välkommen med din ansökan redan nu!**
 Vi vill att det ska vara enkelt att söka jobb hos oss. Om du inte har ett CV redo räcker det med att du länkar en väl ifylld LinkedIn-profil. I din ansökan får du svara på de frågor vi behöver svar på i den här delen av processen, och personligt brev är därför inte obligatoriskt. Vår rekryteringsprocess innehåller tester, intervjuer, bakgrundskontroll och ID-kontroll. Observera att vi inte under denna rekryteringsprocess kommer be dig logga in med ditt Bank-id eller scanna någon QR-kod, men vi kommer be dig styrka din identitet i processens slutskede.
   

  

 Vid frågor om rekrytering på Axfood, kontakta Medarbetarsupporten eller läs mer: Så går det till när du söker jobb inom Axfood. Om du har frågor om tjänsten, kontakta elisabeth.wehlin@axfood.se. Av GDPR-skäl behandlar vi inga ansökningar eller annan personlig information via mail.
   

  

 Läs mer och se filmer om Axfood som arbetsgivare här: Din karriärväg hos Axfood | Utveckling och möjligheter | Axfood

title: Senior Python Developer (f/m/x)
description:
Join Sii Sweden to strengthen the technical backbone of a large-scale retail platform. You’ll work in the intersection of software development, automation, and infrastructure, helping ensure reliable, secure, and efficient provisioning, deployment, and configuration management across retail and data centre environments.
   

  

 You will collaborate closely with development, infrastructure, and QA/lab teams to design, maintain, and evolve the tools and systems used for repeatable deployments in distributed environments.
   

  

****Your tasks****
* Building and maintaining Python-based tools and automation scripts
* Developing and improving a YAML-driven deployment and configuration framework
* Integrating and operating automation and platform components
* Supporting automation workflows for bare-metal provisioning and virtualized infrastructure
* Enabling stable and repeatable testing and deployment together with QA and lab teams
* Contributing to architectural discussions with a focus on scalability, maintainability, and security
* Sharing knowledge, supporting other engineers, and contributing to documentation and best practices


**Requirements**
* At least 5 years of extensive experience in Python programming
* Solid Linux administration background
* Hands-on experience with configuration management and CI/CD
* Understanding of virtualization and provisioning workflows
* Good knowledge of networking fundamentals and IP management concepts
* Familiarity with identity, secrets management, and monitoring
* Fluent in English, Swedish is a plus


 Job no. JOB-RQAKG
   

  

 Sii ensures that all hiring decisions are made solely on the basis of qualifications and competence. We are committed to equal and fair treatment of all, regardless of legally protected characteristics. At Sii, we promote a diverse and inclusive work environment, in full compliance with applicable anti-discrimination laws.
   

  

**Benefits For You**
 Solid financial situation
   

  

 Many experts you can learn from
   

  

 Contracts with the biggest brands
   

  

 Refferals program
   

  

 Mentoring program
   

  

 14 authentic core values
   

  

 Inclusive culture based on dialogue
   

  

 Regular integration events and trips
   

  

 Passion Sponsorship Program
   

  

 Open and accessible management team
   

  

 Profit sharing
   

  

 Welcome packs & occasional gifts

title: Integration Specialist
description:
**Trivs du med att skapa smarta kopplingar mellan system och dataflöden? Som en del av Solitas integrationscommunity får du jobba nära engagerade specialister och arkitekter som brinner för att forma framtidens integrationslandskap – och utvecklas tillsammans på vägen.** 




  





 Inom vår Connectivity-enhet på Solita har vi över 20 års erfarenhet av integration och processautomation – och vår passion för att hjälpa kunder att skapa robusta, skalbara och framtidssäkra lösningar är lika stark idag som när vi började. Genom att använda den senaste tekniken inom API-design, molnintegration och DevOps säkerställer vi inte bara snabb leverans av affärsvärde, utan också effektiva kopplingar mellan system och dataflöden.
 



  





**En dag på Solita** 




  





 En dag på Solita kan ofta börja med ett standup-möte med kund och dina team-medlemmar, där ni planerar dagens arbete, går igenom prioriteringar och identifierar eventuella utmaningar. Sen kliver du in i ditt arbete: kanske jobbar du med att utveckla integrationer och API:er i exempelvis Azure, migrera integrationer mellan olika plattformar, eller skissa upp en integrationslösning baserat på en kravspec. Under dagen kan det dyka upp ad-hoc möten med kund eller kollegor som behöver stöttning i sitt arbete. Ofta innebär det att lösa problem: kanske behöver du felsöka en oväntad driftstörning, identifiera en flaskhals i ett integrationsflöde eller hitta en ny väg för att möta kundens krav.
 



  





**Emma Fägerlind** 
 som jobbar som Integration Lead hos oss, beskriver sitt nuvarande uppdrag:
 



  





*“Mitt team bygger integrationer som ska stödja HR- och ekonomiprocesser för en kommun. Som integrationsledare har jag en blandad roll där jag både får arbeta med samordning, funktionskrav och teknisk lösning. Jag hjälper att ta fram specifikationer och förstå vad det är vi behöver göra för att lösa kundens behov. När är vi stöter på problem eller frågor försöker få jag teamet att komma framåt genom att lyfta frågor till relevanta parter.* 




*Problemlösningen är det roligaste i mitt jobb – att få sätta sig in i nya flöden och tekniker och tillsammans med andra försöka hitta den lämpligaste lösningen. Det är fantastiskt att få vara del av ett team och se hur olika personers egenskaper bidrar på olika sätt till resultatet.”* 




  





**Din roll som Integration Specialist** 




  





 Som Integration Specialist på Solita jobbar du i nära samarbete med arkitekter, utvecklare och kundteam för att skapa helhetslösningar som stöder verksamhetens behov, samt bidrar till plattformsutveckling och kunskapsdelning inom integrationsområdet.
 



  





 I denna roll har du möjlighet att utvecklas inom följande områden:
 



  





**Integration & API developer** 
 – Detta är en mer renodlad utvecklingsroll med fokus på att utveckla och underhålla integrationer mellan system, API:er och molntjänster. Du använder problemlösning och förståelse för affärsprocesser för att definiera optimala lösningar för kunder, samt ansvarar för implementeringen av lösningar enligt kravspec. Tidigare erfarenhet av systemutveckling och förmåga att utveckla och implementera diverse integrationslösningar hjälper dig att ta dig an denna roll.
 



  





**Integration lead** 
 – I denna roll har du chansen att jobba närmare verksamheten där du i dialog med kundens verksamhet och andra system tar fram krav på integrationer, leder integrationsarbetet och tester av integrationer. Här ser vi gärna att du är familjär med integrationskoncept och har tidigare erfarenhet i en teknisk och verksamhetsnära roll där du jobbat med kravhantering samt teknisk design av integrationer.
 



  





 Vi jobbar främst med molnbaserade plattformar eller ramverk i molntekniker. Det är därmed meriterande om du har kunskap inom DevOps, IaC, infrastruktur och nätverk. Några av de plattformar och tekniker vi använder är Microsoft Azure, där fokus ligger på Azure integration services. Samt iPaaS-lösningar (Integration platform as a Service) som Boomi och Workato.
 



  





 Vi letar inte bara efter tekniska skills, vi vill jobba med dig som tar ansvar för att bygga rätt lösningar på rätt sätt genom att utmana med omtanke. Du kommer trivas hos oss om du tycker om att dela med dig av din kunskap lika mycket som du är nyfiken på- och lyfter andras.
 



  





**Karriärbanor på Solita** 




  





 Jobbet som konsult hos oss innebär ofta en brant utvecklingskurva och variation sett till både arbetsuppgifter och roller. Vi ser karriärbanor inte som en specifik trappa utan mer som ett landskap med flera möjliga individanpassade orienteringar, både i höjd- och sidled.
 



  





**Sam** 
 jobbar exempelvis idag som People Lead parallellt med sin roll som Service Delivery Manager.
 



**Lia** 
 har haft chansen att bära många hattar under sin tid hos oss – från developer till lead developer och arkitekt i både lokala och gränsöverskridande integrationsprojekt.
 



**Andrei** 
 har också utvecklats väldigt brett som scrum master, team/tech lead, SDM, arkitekt, projektledare och kravställare i ett större projekt de senaste 3 åren.
 



  





**Vad vi erbjuder** 




  





 Vår företagskultur är väldigt viktig för oss. Vi värdesätter låg hierarki, självständighet och ansvar, värdeskapande arbete och trevliga kollegor.
 **Här** 
 kan du läsa mer om vår kultur, och
 **här** 
 kan du bläddra bland våra tech-bloggar.
 



  




* **Meningsfulla projekt:** 
 Arbeta i en agil miljö med varierande uppdrag där du kan påverka teknikval och arbetssätt för att skapa de bästa lösningarna
* **Flexibilitet och autonomi** 
 för att utforma ditt arbete med flextider– läs mer från vår
 **blogg.**
* **Ständig utveckling:** 
 Vi erbjuder kontinuerlig kompetensutveckling för att säkerställa att våra medarbetare ligger längst fram i teknikutvecklingen.
* **Innovativ kultur:** 
 Arbeta tillsammans med några av de främsta experterna inom systemintegration, data, AI och cloud.



  





 Utöver detta får du även ta del av följande
 **förmåner** 
 :
 



  





 💰 Fast lön oberoende av beläggningsgrad
 



 🏦 Pensionsavsättning i linje med ITP1 samt möjlighet till löneväxling till ditt pensionssparande vid inkomst över 8,07 inkomstbasbelopp
 



 🛋️ Möjligheter till flex för en god work-life-balance
 



 🏖️ 30 semesterdagar
 



 🩺 Sjukvårdsförsäkring via Skandia för både din mentala och fysiska hälsa som täcker dig även utanför tjänstetid
 



 🏋️ ♀️ Friskvårdsbidrag på 5000 kr via Benifex
 



 💻 Ett brett nätverk av erfarna specialister från olika områden inom tech att samarbeta med
 



 🔗 Intern coach för att stödja ditt välbefinnande
 



 🪩 After Work och hobbyaktiviteter
 



 🥐 Fredagsfrukost
 



  





**Vilka är vi?** 




  





 Solita är ett värderingsstyrt konsultbolag med över 2100 medarbetare i 9 länder, varav 230 i Sverige. Vår storlek gör oss tillräckligt stora för att vara en stabil och innovativ arbetsgivare, men samtidigt tillräckligt små för att värna om våra medarbetare och kunder. Med bred kompetens inom digital transformation erbjuder vi en dynamisk arbetsmiljö. Hos oss får du friheten att utvecklas, både professionellt och personligt.
 



  





**Intresserad av att höra mer?** 




  





 Låter det som en spännande utmaning? Skicka in din ansökan och bli en del av vårt team som ligger i framkant inom systemintegration. Om du har några frågor, hör gärna av dig till:
 



 People Lead och rekryterande chef
 **Sam Odeh** 
 (sam.odeh(at)solita.se); eller
 



 rekryteringsansvarig
 **Kajsa Törnroos** 
 (kajsa.tornroos(at)solita.se).
 



  





**Hur ser processen ut?** 




  





 I rekryteringsprocessen tror vi på en gedigen och effektiv process. Vi går igenom ansökningar löpande. Om vi ser en potentiell matchning, bjuder vi in dig till ett första möte för att lära känna dig och berätta mer om vår kultur och våra värderingar på Solita. I andra intervjun fokuserar vi på din tekniska kompetens och din erfarenhet. Om allt går bra tar vi oss vidare till sista steget där vi presenterar ett erbjudande och välkomnar dig som ny Solitan!
 



  





**Din arbetsplats kan vara belägen i Stockholm, Göteborg eller Malmö.** 




  





*Under juli månad kan vår återkoppling dröja något längre än vanligt då vi njuter av sommarledigheter. Vi hör av oss senast i augusti. Tack för ditt tålamod och önskar dig en riktigt fin sommar!*

title: Lösningsarkitekt /Utvecklare M365 sökes till Försvarshögskolan
description:
Verksamheten utvecklas kontinuerligt och behovet av digitalisering och nya IT-tjänster ökar, vilket ställer höga krav på väl avvägda IT‑lösningar i samspel med säkerhetskrav, verksamhetens behov och den pedagogiska inriktningen.
   

  

 IT‑avdelningens uppdrag är brett och omfattar allt från att tillhandahålla och vidareutveckla lärosätets digitala plattformar till införande av AI samt verksamhetsnära IT‑stöd med fokus på IT‑ och informationssäkerhet. Microsoft 365 utgör en central plattform i denna utveckling.
   

  

 Arbetsuppgifter
   

  

 I denna roll har du ett övergripande tekniskt ansvar för Microsoft 365‑plattformen. Du arbetar med lösningsarkitektur, tekniska vägval och utveckling av plattformen i linje med verksamhetens behov och organisationens krav på struktur, säkerhet och effektivitet.
   

  

 Du ansvarar för att designa, vidareutveckla och strukturera lösningar inom Microsoft 365 med fokus på samarbete, informationshantering och automatisering. Arbetet omfattar även att driva utveckling kring hur AI‑stöd kan användas i plattformen, exempelvis genom Microsoft Copilot.
   

  

 Du ingår i förvaltningsorganisationen och arbetar i nära samverkan med verksamhetsförvaltningsledaren. En central del av rollen är att leda den tekniska utvecklingen samt att samordna och leda det team av förvaltare och specialister som arbetar med plattformens utveckling och förvaltning.
   

  

 Rollen innefattar även samordning inom SeqOps avseende plattformsrelaterade initiativ och kontinuerlig utveckling.
   

  

 Vem söker vi
   

  

 Du har minst fem års erfarenhet av Microsoft 365 i större organisationer och erfarenhet av lösningsarkitektur. Du har god kompetens inom SharePoint och Teams samt erfarenhet av utveckling inom Microsoft 365, exempelvis Power Platform och automatisering.
   

  

 Du har erfarenhet av governance, informationshantering och arbete i förvaltningsmodell (t.ex. PM3). Du har arbetat med Microsoft Copilot eller motsvarande AI‑stöd samt har erfarenhet av att leda och samordna arbete.
   

  

 Du har god pedagogisk förmåga och kan kommunicera tekniska lösningar. Du behärskar svenska i tal och skrift och kan tillgodogöra dig teknisk dokumentation på engelska.
   

  

 Personliga egenskaper
   

  

 Vi kommer lägga stor vikt vid dina personliga egenskaper och för att lyckas i rollen krävs att du är lugn, trygg och professionell i ditt agerande och har förmåga att skapa förtroende i olika sammanhang. Du arbetar strukturerat och noggrant och har ett helhetsperspektiv.
   

  

 Du är kommunikativ och har lätt för att anpassa ditt budskap till olika målgrupper. Du är prestigelös, samarbetsinriktad och trivs i en roll där du kombinerar tekniskt djup med samordning och ledning av andra.
   

  

 För att trivas hos oss behöver du vara en engagerad och närvarande individ som vill bidra till Försvarshögskolans professionella utveckling, kollegiala samarbetskultur och sociala sammanhållning. Det faller sig naturligt för dig att dela med dig av din kunskap och bidra till att skapa en givande och god arbetsmiljö.
   

  

 Om anställningen
   

  

 Detta är en tillsvidareanställning på heltid som kan komma att inledas med sex månaders provanställning.
   

  

 En anställning vid Försvarshögskolan kan komma att innebära en säkerhetsprövning för placering i säkerhetsklass vilket innebär registerkontroll och i vissa fall säkerhetsintervju hos Säkerhetspolisen.
   

  

 Anställningen kan komma att innefatta krigsplacering. Om du redan är krigsplacerad i din nuvarande anställning på en myndighet och din kompetens behövs i Försvarshögskolans krigsorganisation sker det en förhandling mellan berörd myndighet och Försvarshögskolan om var du ska vara placerad.
   

  

 Tillträde
   

  

 Enligt överenskommelse.
   

  

 Lön och förmåner
   

  

 Försvarshögskolan tillämpar individuell lönesättning.
   

  

 Förmåner för anställda vid Försvarshögskolan - FHS/Förmåner/anställd.
   

  

 Ansökan
   

  

 Ansökan ska innehålla ett CV samt personligt brev och skickas in via Försvarshögskolans rekryteringssystem genom att klicka på länken ”Ansök” på annonssidan.
   

  

 I det personliga brevet ber vi dig motivera varför tjänsten intresserar dig, vilka av dina kunskaper och erfarenheter som är mest relevanta samt hur du tror att du kan bidra i rollen som ledningssekreterare hos oss.
   

  

 Komplett ansökan ska vara Försvarshögskolan tillhanda senast sista ansökningsdagen vid midnatt, CET/CEST (Central European Time/Central European Summer Time).
   

  

 I de fall det inte råder en jämn könsbalans kan Försvarshögskolan vid lika eller i stort sätt lika kvalifikationer hos de sökande anställa den av underrepresenterat kön.
   

  

 Vi tillämpar löpande urval och intervjuer, så skicka in din ansökan så snart som möjligt.
   

  

**Upplysningar**
 För upplysningar om anställningen kontakta it-chef Marith Wiedersheim-Paul, Marith.Wiedersheim-Paul@fhs.se.
   

  

 Under perioden juli-augusti är möjligheten att besvara frågor om anställningen begränsad på grund av semester. Återkoppling lämnas så snart som möjligt, men svar kan i vissa fall dröja till efter semesterperiodens slut.
   

  

**Välkommen med din ansökan senast den 12 juli 2026!**

title: Senior iOS Developer - Stockholm
description:
**Hello, let’s meet!** 




**Who We Are** 




 While Xebia is a global tech company, our journey in CEE started with two Polish companies – PGS Software, known for world-class cloud and software solutions, and GetInData, a pioneer in Big Data. Today, we’re a team of 1,000+ experts delivering top-notch work across cloud, data, and software. And we’re just getting started.
 



**What We Do** 




 We work on projects that matter – and that make a difference. From fintech and e-commerce to aviation, logistics, media, and fashion, we help our clients build scalable platforms, data and AI solutions, and cutting-edge applications to shape the future of tech. Our clients include McLaren, Aviva, Deloitte, Spotify, Disney, ING, UPS, Tesco, Truecaller, AllSaints, Volotea, Schmitz Cargobull, Allegro, InPost, and many, many more.
 



 We value smart tech, real ownership, and continuous growth. We use modern, open-source stacks, and we’re proud to be trusted partners of Databricks, dbt, Snowflake, Azure, GCP, and AWS. Fun fact: we were the first AWS Premier Partner in Poland!
 



**Beyond Projects** 




 What makes Xebia special? Our community. We support tech communities, organize meetups (Software Talks, Data Tech Talks), and have a culture that actively support your growth via Guilds, Labs, and personal development budgets — for both tech and soft skills. It’s not just a job. It’s a place to grow.
 



**What sets us apart?** 




 Our mindset. Our vibe. Our people. And while that’s hard to capture in text – come visit us and see for yourself.
 



  





  





**SALARY: up to 8 300 gross EUR/ month** 




  





  





**You will be:** 



* **work from the office in Stockholm 2-3 times per week - is a must** 
 ,
* designing, developing, and maintaining high-quality iOS applications using Swift and modern iOS frameworks,
* collaborating with cross-functional teams to deliver scalable, user-focused features end-to-end,
* contributing to app architecture decisions and continuously improve performance and code quality,
* integrating mobile applications with backend services and handle asynchronous data flows,
* troubleshooting, debugging, and resolving complex issues in production environments while supporting ongoing improvements.



**Your profile:** 



* **work from the office in Stockholm 2-3 times per week - is a must** 
 ,
* 5+ years of iOS development experience in commercial products,
* advanced proficiency in Swift; deep understanding of iOS frameworks, SDKs, and design patterns,
* strong grasp of app architecture (MVC, MVVM, Clean Architecture, etc.) and performance optimization,
* solid experience with asynchronous programming and server communication,
* proven ability to debug and troubleshoot complex, production-level issues,
* practical experience using AI-powered assistants (e.g. Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, Cursor) to improve productivity, quality, or decision-making in software delivery.



**Work from the European Union region and a work permit are required.** 




**Nice to have:** 



* experience with SwiftUI,
* familiarity with CI/CD tools - GitHub Actions, Fastlane, or similar,
* experience mentoring or onboarding junior developers,
* experience applying GenAI in a more structured way within the SDLC, including defined workflows, prompt patterns, or tool integrations embedded into daily work,
* interest in and familiarity with emerging AI-driven practices (e.g. agent-based workflows, automation patterns, AI-augmented development), with a willingness to explore and experiment beyond standard approaches.



**Recruitment Process:** 




**CV** 
 review –
 **HR** 
 call –
 **Interview** 
 –
 **Client** 
 Interview –
 **Decision**

title: Microstrategy  & Businessobjects Specialist
description:
**About Cognizant**
 Cognizant is one of the world's leading professional services companies, helping organizations modernize technology, reimagine processes, and transform experiences so they stay ahead in a fast-changing world. With over 300,000 associates globally, Cognizant combines a passion for client satisfaction, technology innovation, deep industry and business process expertise, and a global, collaborative workforce that embodies the future of work. We are consistently listed among the most admired companies in the world and among the best companies to work for. Our culture is built on a foundation of transparency, inclusion, and collaboration — empowering our people to grow and thrive both professionally and personally. At Cognizant, you won't just be part of a company; you'll be part of a community that is shaping the future of industries across the globe.
   

  

**Role Summary**
 We are looking for a senior BI lead who can own the end-to-end design, development and administration of MicroStrategy and SAP BusinessObjects platforms. The candidate will lead a team of BI developers, drive solution architecture, and work closely with business stakeholders to deliver scalable reporting and analytics solutions.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Lead the design, development and delivery of reports, dashboards and documents using MicroStrategy and SAP BusinessObjects (Web Intelligence, Universe Designer / IDT).
* Own solution architecture, data modelling and schema design across the BI landscape.
* Perform MSTR / BO administration - object management, security model, project configuration, intelligence server tuning and upgrades / migrations.
* Optimise report performance, query design and VLDB settings for large data volumes. Translate business requirements into technical specifications and guide the development team through delivery.
* Manage code reviews, best practices, deployment and production support.
* Coordinate with data engineering and source-system teams on data quality and integration.
* Mentor junior developers and provide technical leadership across the engagement.


**Mandatory Skills**
* Strong hands-on expertise in MicroStrategy (Developer / Architect, Web, Schema & Application objects, Intelligence Server, dossiers / dashboards).
* Strong experience in SAP BusinessObjects (Web Intelligence, Universe design via IDT / UDT, CMC administration). Solid SQL and data warehousing / dimensional modelling concepts (star / snowflake schema).
* Experience with platform administration, upgrades and migrations.
* Performance tuning and troubleshooting of reports and BI servers.
* Strong stakeholder management and team leadership experience.


**Good to Have**
 Exposure to cloud data platforms (Snowflake, Azure, AWS) and modern BI tools (Power BI / Tableau).
   

  

 Experience in the Banking / Financial Services domain.
   

  

 Knowledge of ETL tools and scheduling.

title: Head of Enterprise IT
description:
**Description**
*Position at LeoVegas Group*
**About The Role**
 We are looking for a visionary Enterprise IT Manager to lead the strategic evolution of the department. You will maintain our high standards of daily operations by managing enterprise IT systems, devices, and support services for our engineering and business teams. You will also actively pivot the organisation to focus on Engineering Enablement to create great conditions for our developers to build and ship software without friction.
   

  

**YOU WILL BE RESPONSIBLE FOR:**
 Global Team Leadership
   

  

* Lead, mentor, and evolve a distributed team of 35 IT professionals across eight countries and multiple time zones.
* Manage six direct reports, fostering a culture of autonomy, customer service, and technical curiosity.
* Travel occasionally to our key hubs to build relationships and align operations.


 Engineering-First Strategy
   

  

* Partner with Engineering VPs and Leads to understand their pain points.
* Tilt the IT roadmap to prioritise developer efficiency—whether that means high-performance compute hardware, optimised network low-latency routes for testing, or efficient VPN solutions to make it easy to test our applications.


 Operational Excellence at Scale
   

  

* Oversee the lifecycle management of hardware, software, and mobile devices for the entire 2,000-person workforce.
* Manage corporate networks and security protocols, balancing security requirements with the flexibility engineers need to work effectively.
* Ensure our Global Service Desk provides "white glove" support to everyone from the C-suite to the Junior Dev.
* Level up the IT supplier landscape, leveraging on opportunities to consolidate and evolving IT supplier management.


**OUR SUCCESSFUL CANDIDATE WILL HAVE THE FOLLOWING:**
**Essential Skills**
* You have previous success in a comparable Enterprise IT management position within a modern tech environment.
* You have experience managing managers. You know how to run a 30+ person organisation across multiple countries and time zones (EU/UK/US), focusing on strategy and unblocking your team. You know how to build culture remotely.
* You communicate proactively and strategically with Engineering VPs and business leaders to ensure IT is recognised as a strategic enabler. You focus on transparency and clarity to build trust and alignment across the wider organisation.
* You have a strong background working within or alongside software development organisations. You understand the SDLC (Software Development Life Cycle) and how IT decisions impact compile times, build speeds, and developer happiness. You understand what a compile time is and why local admin rights matter.
* You possess an excellent ability to communicate with both technical Engineering VPs and non-technical business leaders (Finance/HR).
* You have experience negotiating contracts with global hardware/software vendors and managing the logistics of hardware distribution to challenging locations.
* You have knowledge of enterprise networking, specifically tuned for a distributed workforce.
* You are versatile - you can present a budget to the CFO in the morning and dive into a complex distribution logic problem with your team in the afternoon.


 NICE TO HAVES
   

  

* Engineering background: as a SysAdmin, a DevOps engineer, or a Developer.
* A strong preference for automating onboarding, offboarding, and provisioning processes. You prefer code/scripts over manual tickets.


**Who We Are**
 At the core of LeoVegas Group is Team Leo. Our culture is our foundation and is what enables us to innovate, build, and lead as we trailblaze our way through the igaming industry. We’re a team of over 1400 innovators, initiators, and groundbreakers working in a fast-paced and agile environment across 11 offices worldwide.
   

  

**Benefits**
* Hybrid work policy (3 days a week in the office)
* 4 weeks of Workation (T&C apply)
* 30 annual vacation days
* Occupational Pension
* 5,000 SEK wellness contribution annually
* Parental Leave Top-Up
* Possibility to enroll in a private health care insurance for both you and your partner
* 1,500 SEK equipment allowance
* Benify - benefits portal with many offers and discounts


**JOIN US!**
 In our pride, we empower our teammates to find their roar and run with their wildest ideas. We don’t wait for things to happen; we pounce and make it happen!
   

  

 Would you be a good fit for the Leo Pride - give us a roar!
   

  

 \*\*As our company working language is English, we’d like to see your CV in English, please\*\*

title: Backendutvecklare .NET/Azure till prisbelönt digitalbyrå
description:
***Att vakna på morgonen med längtan att gå till jobbet!***
 Vi har ett mål att alla som jobbar hos oss ska trivas så mycket att man vaknar med ett leende på måndag morgon. Vi är kanske inte Sveriges bästa bolag inom alla punkter men vi är Sveriges näst bästa bolag enligt Great Place to Work 2020. Vi tror att det beror på vår energi och nyfikenhet, vårt sätt att välkomna olikheter och våra erfarenheter som vi gärna delar med oss av.
   

  

 Rebel and Bird är ett av B3s dotterbolag som tar hand om kunders önskemål och krav och förädlar dessa till flerfaldigt prisbelönta tekniska lösningar. Du blir inte nedbunden i gamla tekniker utan får möjligheten att jobba med det senaste inom backend och utvecklas med oss varje dag. Vårt absolut tydligaste mål med verksamheten är att alla ska ha kul på jobbet. Det låter som en plattityd men det är vårt stora mål. Vi försöker (när så går) att träffas och göra roliga saker utanför arbetstid någon gång i månaden utöver julfest, sommarfest och konferenser.
   

  

**Arbetsuppgifter**
 Du kommer arbeta både i interna och externa åtaganden, dvs i våra egna produktutvecklingsteam där vi tar helhetsgrepp på våra kunders önskemål, från koncept till UX och publicerad webb samt ibland på konsultbasis i våra kunders team. Vi har i dagsläget tre större åtaganden men en hel del mindre inhouse-projekt och externa konsultåtaganden. Här är två större inhouse-åtaganden:
   

  

* Parks and Resorts - Vi utvecklar hela webblösningen inhouse i samarbete med kundens redaktörer och produktägare för samtliga parker. Den tekniska plattformen utvecklas med contentful/gatsby och .NET/Azure. Vi har blivit uppmärksammade nationellt för detta arbete, dels med ett silver i Svenska Designpriset 2019 för Kolmården, en nominering i Svenska Designpriset 2020 för Gröna Lund (prisutdelningen har ännu inte skett så vi vet inte var vi landar) samt Kolmården seger i IDG topp-100 för bästa turismsajt.
* Filmstaden - Har du bokat/köpt biobiljett? Kanske inte på sistone men innan året som gud glömde gjorde du antagligen det har du använt vår lösning.
