* Aktieprogram och delägarskap: Som delägare har du möjlighet att påverka och i vårt aktieprogram matchar CGI ditt bidrag, krona för krona upp till 3% av din månadslön.
* Friskvårdsbidrag: Vi erbjuder ett årligt friskvårdsbidrag på 4000 kr.
* Föräldralön: Vi betalar upp till cirka 90% av din lön under den första tiden hemma.
* Trygg anställning: Våra konsulter anställs med kollektivavtal och försäkringar.
* Pensionslösningar: Vi erbjuder attraktiva och förmånliga pensionslösningar.


 Låter det intressant?
   

  

 Vi ser fram emot att höra ifrån dig! Skicka in din ansökan redan idag då urvalet sker löpande. Har du frågor om rollen, kontakta gärna Farzad Ahmed på farzad.ahmed@cgi.com. Varmt välkommen med din ansökan!
   

  

**Together, as owners, let’s turn meaningful insights into action.**
 Life at CGI is rooted in ownership, teamwork, respect and belonging. Here, you’ll reach your full potential because…
   

  

 You are invited to be an owner from day 1 as we work together to bring our Dream to life. That’s why we call ourselves CGI Partners rather than employees. We benefit from our collective success and actively shape our company’s strategy and direction.
   

  

 Your work creates value. You’ll develop innovative solutions and build relationships with teammates and clients while accessing global capabilities to scale your ideas, embrace new opportunities, and benefit from expansive industry and technology expertise.
   

  

 You’ll shape your career by joining a company built to grow and last. You’ll be supported by leaders who care about your health and well-being and provide you with opportunities to deepen your skills and broaden your horizons.
   

  

 Come join our team—one of the largest IT and business consulting services firms in the world.

title: Senior SAP S/4HANA CRM Functional Consultant
description:
**About Justera Group**
 Justera Group AB is a leading Swedish IT consulting firm with great experience specializing in building high-performing technology teams and delivering end-to-end IT solutions. Led by dynamic female executives, Justera Group focuses on helping businesses harness the power of digital technologies to continuously evolve in today’s rapidly changing economy. The company has deep expertise in IT consultancy, software development, and recruitment services, providing clients with purpose-driven, well-trained consultants who consistently deliver efficient and effective results. Justera Group manages the entire talent lifecycle, from hiring to ongoing management, ensuring the right fit for each project on time and within budget. With their strong commitment to quality, collaboration, and client success, Justera Group is a trusted partner for technology innovation across Sweden.
   

  

**About the Role:**
 We are looking for an experienced Senior SAP S/4HANA CRM Functional Consultant to join a Billing & CRM team within a Nordic Customer IT organization.
   

  

 The team develops, maintains, and supports SAP-based solutions built on SAP IS-U and SAP CRM that enable customer operations across the Nordic region. As part of a major digital transformation initiative, the organization is preparing for the migration from SAP CRM to SAP S/4HANA Customer Engagement.
   

  

 The initial assignment will focus on the preparation phase of the migration project, followed by active involvement in the implementation and migration activities.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities:**
* Configure, implement, maintain, and optimize SAP CRM solutions.
* Support the migration from SAP CRM to SAP S/4HANA Customer Engagement.
* Gather and analyze business requirements and translate them into functional SAP solutions.
* Configure and support SAP CRM Sales, Service, and Marketing processes.
* Work with Product Modeling Environment (PME) and CRM Middleware.
* Prepare and maintain functional documentation and business process documentation.
* Collaborate with business stakeholders, technical teams, and solution architects.
* Support testing, troubleshooting, and deployment activities.
* Mentor team members and share functional knowledge and best practices.


**Requirements:**
* Extensive experience as an SAP CRM Functional Consultant.
* Strong hands-on expertise in SAP CRM configuration and support.
* Experience with SAP S/4HANA Utilities for Customer Engagement.
* Strong functional knowledge of:
+ Sales
+ Service
+ Marketing modules

* Experience with Product Modeling Environment (PME).
* Strong knowledge of SAP CRM Middleware.
* Experience documenting business processes and functional specifications.
* Excellent communication, analytical, and problem-solving skills.
* Fluency in both Swedish and English (spoken and written).


**What We Offer:**
* A dynamic and innovative workplace driving advancements in cutting-edge robotic technologies
* The opportunity to collaborate with talented cross-functional teams on meaningful and impactful projects
* Competitive compensation and comprehensive benefits package
* A supportive culture that fosters continuous learning, growth, and professional development
* Flexible hybrid working model for an optimal work-life balance
* 25 days of annual leave to recharge and relax
* An annual wellness allowance of 3,500 SEK to support your health and wellbeing

title: DevOps Engineer
description:
**Software, the fuel for mobility**  

  

We bring bold digital visions to life. So we’re on the lookout for more curious and creative engineers who want to create change – one line of high-quality code at a time. Our transformation isn't for everyone, but if you're excited about solving the leading-edge technological challenges facing the auto industry, then let’s talk about your next move.

**Let's introduce ourselves**
-----------------------------

  

We are seeking a new talented DevOps Software Engineer to help shape the future of observability in modern infrastructure.  

  

Are you passionate about building tools that empower teams to operate at scale? Join our collaborative engineering team to design, develop, and support observability platforms that give deep insight into complex, cloud-native environments.  

  

In this role, you’ll work closely with engineers and architects to integrate and enhance monitoring, logging, and tracing systems across Kubernetes clusters—using GitOps principles to keep everything versioned, automated, and reliable.  

  

We're looking for someone who thrives in fast-paced environments, communicates clearly, and enjoys solving real-world operational challenges with clean, scalable code.

**What you'll do**
------------------

  

* Experience with Kubernetes and cloud-native ecosystems
* Familiarity with observability stacks (e.g., Prometheus, Grafana, Loki, Splunk, OpenTelemetry)
* GitOps mindset and tools (e.g., ArgoCD, Flux)
* A collaborative, team-first attitude and a sharp eye for automation opportunities

  

  

Let’s build systems that don’t just run – tell us *how* they’re running.

**What you'll bring**
---------------------

  

We believe you bring 2–10 years of experience working with cloud infrastructure, with a strong focus on implementing observability solutions—including log management, metrics, and tracing. You have a solid understanding of technical architecture and hands-on experience in the design, development, and delivery of projects across various domains.  

  

You likely hold a BSc or higher degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related technical field—or have equivalent practical experience.  

  

Key Responsibilities:

  

* Design and Implement Observability Solutions: Build and maintain observability tools (monitoring, logging, metrics, tracing) to ensure the health and performance of microservices running on AWS.
* Monitoring & Logging: Set up and optimize monitoring using tools like Prometheus, Grafana, CloudWatch, OTEL and Splunk stacks for real-time insights into the AWS infrastructure.
* Distributed Tracing: Implement distributed tracing solutions (e.g., OpenTelemetry, Tempo) to trace and debug service interactions across multiple microservices.
* Proactive Alerting: Establish alerting mechanisms to detect performance anomalies and potential failures in real-time.
* Dashboards & Reporting: Create dashboards and reports to monitor and secure service-level objectives (SLOs), key performance indicators (KPIs), and overall system health.
* Incident Management: Investigate and troubleshoot issues, identifying root causes, and providing insights to reduce mean time to detection (MTTD) and mean time to resolution (MTTR).
* Collaboration with Teams: Collaborate with DevOps and development teams to ensure observability best practices are embedded into CI/CD pipelines and infrastructure as code (IaC) practices.
* Automation & Optimization: Take part and lead any initiatives that will help us operate in more efficient manner whereby embracing AI will be a pre-requisite.
  


Tool chain used:

  

* Frameworks: Docker, Kubernetes
* Infrastructure: AWS
* Development & GitOps tools: Gitlab, ArgoCD, Harbor, Sonarqube, Dependency Tracker, GIT
* Observability support tools: OTEL, Splunk, Loki, Tempo, Prometheus, Pagerduty, Apica, Grafana, Slack, Confluence, Jira, AI Agent (HolmesGPT + Azure foundry)
* SW Languages: Python, Java, JavaScript, Typescript, Terraform, Ansible
  

**Volvo Cars. For Life.**  

  

For nearly a century, Volvo Cars has empowered people to move freely in a personal, sustainable and safe way. Today, we are driving bold advancements in electrification, sustainability and automotive safety. To realise our ambitious vision, we are seeking innovative minds who are ready to tackle the challenges of tomorrow – today.
  

  

At Volvo Cars, we believe extraordinary things are achieved by ordinary people with a passion for making a difference. If you’re inspired by the opportunity to help redefine the future of mobility, we invite you to be part of our journey.  

  

**Ready to take the next step?**  

  

Submit your CV in English and tell us why you’re the ideal candidate for a role at Volvo Cars. Applications must be received no later than 10th of July 2026. You will receive a confirmation email after your submission.  

  

As part of the recruitment process, the final candidates will undergo a background check.  

  

We welcome your application!



#LI-DNP

title: BizTalk DevOps-ingenjör till kund inom energibranschen
description:
Är du en DevOps-ingenjör med mångårig erfarenhet av BizTalk? Då har du hittat rätt.
  
Vår kund söker en skicklig BizTalk DevOps-ingenjör som är analytisk och kan lösa integrationsproblem. För denna roll krävs omfattande kunskap och erfarenhet av Biztalk. Detta är ett konsultuppdrag på cirka 6 månader.
  
Arbetsuppgifter
  
Underhåll integrationslösningar med BizTalk
  
Utveckla bygg- och releasepipelines för BizTalk-applikationer
  
Hantera incidenter och utföra rotorsaksanalyser för produktionssystem
  
Övervaka BizTalk-miljöer
  
Utför plattformsuppgraderingar och patchar
  
  

Teamet är ett agilt team, organiserat enligt flera kompetenser. Totalt finns det 12 DevOps-ingenjörer, baserade från fyra olika länder, vilket innebär att det är ett internationellt team (miljö). Atmosfären i teamet kan beskrivas som samarbetsvillig. Alla teammedlemmar arbetar nära varandra varje dag. För den här rollen är det viktigt att den dagliga verksamheten i BizTalk stöds. Detta innebär att övervaka ärendesystemet och produktion och övervakning av BizTalk-miljöer.
  
Krav
  
Gedigna kunskaper inom BizTalk Server-administration
  
Expertis inom BT360
  
ITIL-baserade ärendehanteringssystemkunskaper
  
Praktisk erfarenhet av Azure DevOps-pipelines, GIT, YAML och PowerShell
  
Goda kunskaper om Windows Server och Microsoft SQL Server
  
Bekantskap med Azure Dashboards och Application Insights
  
  

Flytande i Svenska och Engelska i tal och skrift.
  
Bra att ha färdigheter/mjuka färdigheter
  
Förmåga att analysera och lösa integrationsproblem, vilket säkerställer en smidig drift av integrationsplattformen.
  
Starka kommunikations- och samarbetsförmågor i ett internationellt team.
  
Kan detta vara ett uppdrag som passar dig?
  
Sök redan i dag eller kontakta oss så berättar vi gärna mer. Vi behöver en ansökan inkluderat CV och personligt brev på svenska som matchar vår kunds krav. Kunden kan fatta beslut tidigare än sista ansökningsdatum, urval och intervjuer sker löpande. NXT Interim och NXT Rekrytering är ett nischat och innovativt företag som är verksamma inom konsult och rekryteringsbranschen.
  
Vi är verksamma inom HR, IT, Ekonomi, Sälj och Marknad och har över 20 års erfarenhet i branschen. Vi erbjuder våra konsulter bl.a sjukförsäkring, remote-arbetsplatser och flera andra förmåner som förgyller deras vardag. Vid anställning tillämpar vi kollektivavtal.

title: Senior Fullstack Engineer
description:
### **Job description**


**Company Overview**


Sigma Connectivity is a tech house with a big heart for technology, people, and turning clever ideas into real products. We are a team of around 700 engineers, with our main office in Lund, Southern Sweden, and colleagues across Sweden, the US, UK, Poland, Germany and Denmark.


We work with connected products, cloud solutions, consumer electronics, IoT devices and everything in between. Sometimes that means helping a customer shape an early idea. Sometimes it means building, scaling, testing and shipping the solution. Quite often, it means solving tricky problems together over coffee.


Our culture is built around curiosity, collaboration and a healthy dose of Nordic work-life balance. We like people who share knowledge, ask questions, try things out and enjoy building great technology together. At Sigma Connectivity, you will never work alone — unless you really need five minutes to debug something mysterious.


**Job Overview**


We are looking for a Senior Cloud Fullstack Developer who enjoys working across the full stack, from cloud services and backend development to frontend experiences and DevOps practices.


In this role, you will be part of a skilled and friendly team where Java, TypeScript and IaS are central parts of our daily work.


You will help design, build and maintain modern cloud-based solutions, contribute hands-on in projects, and work closely with colleagues from different technical disciplines.


You might spend one day developing backend services, another day improving a React frontend, and the next helping the team make deployments smoother, safer and more automated.


We like people who enjoy variety, take ownership and are happy to share both good ideas and bad puns.


This is a role for someone who wants to build robust software, learn new things, influence technical direction and have fun with a team that genuinely enjoys working together.


**The Role**


This is a senior, hands-on role for someone who enjoys building cloud solutions end to end and making teams more effective along the way. You will work across backend, frontend, infrastructure and delivery practices, with a mix of product thinking, engineering quality and practical problem-solving.


You will contribute to:


* Designing, developing and maintaining cloud-based applications and services
* Building APIs, backend services and user-facing features
* Working with Java, TypeScript and IaS in modern software solutions
* Improving CI/CD pipelines, infrastructure automation and deployment workflows
* Helping the team build systems that are scalable, secure, observable and maintainable
* Translating customer needs into practical technical solutions
* Sharing knowledge through code reviews, technical discussions and collaboration

Bringing positive energy to the team — technical sharpness is great, but being fun to work with matters too


**Requirements**


To succeed in this role, we believe you have:


* Several years of experience (7+) in software development, preferably in cloud-based or distributed systems
* Strong hands-on experience with Java, TypeScript and similar languages
* Experience working across both backend and frontend development
* Practical experience with cloud platforms and cloud-native development
* Experience with IaS, CI/CD and modern DevOps practices
* Good understanding of software architecture, design patterns, scalability, clean code and technical quality
* Ability to make pragmatic technical decisions and explain trade-offs clearly
* Good communication skills in English
* A collaborative mindset and a willingness to help others grow

**Preferred qualifications**


It would be a bonus if you also have experience with:


* Spring, Spring Boot - React, Vue.js
* AWS, Azure or Google Cloud
* Docker and container-based development
* Kubernetes or similar orchestration platforms
* Terraform, CloudFormation or similar infrastructure tooling
* Microservices, event-driven architecture or API design
* Monitoring, logging and observability
* Automated testing and quality practices

Most importantly, you are curious, open-minded and enjoy solving problems together with others. You care about quality, but you also know that great software is built by people — and that work is better when the team enjoys the journey together.


### **More information**


For more information please contact


Daniel Skagerlind,
  

daniel.skagerlind@sigmaconnectivity.se


* #### **Position**


Senior Fullstack Engineer
* #### **Company**


Sigma Connectivity
* #### **Location**


Lund, Sweden
* #### **Publication date**


2026-06-29
* #### **Expiration date**


2026-09-21
* #### **Contact**


Daniel Skagerlind, Daniel.Skagerlind@sigmaconnectivity.se,

Apply

title: Azure Infrastructure Service Manager
description:
**Job description**
-------------------


*At Billerud, we believe that when we keep tomorrow in mind, we will do our very best today. It is thanks to our employees that we are a world-leading company within the field of renewable paper and packaging materials. We work with sustainability at every stage to create a sustainable future – from product to people. Through our global programs, Sustainable Employees and Sustainable Leaders, we prioritize our employees – that they should grow with us and become more sustainable. Do you want to realize your true value and work for a sustainable tomorrow? Join us!*

  

**We are now looking for a Azure Infrastructure Service Manager**  

  

The Azure Infrastructure Service Manager is responsible for the end-to-end ownership, operational stability, lifecycle management, governance, and continuous improvement of Azure infrastructure services.



The role ensures that Azure infrastructure is secure, reliable, scalable, cost-efficient, well-documented, and aligned with business, application, and security requirements.



The role combines a solid understanding of Azure infrastructure with service management accountability. It ensures that Azure infrastructure services are delivered through clear ownership, defined processes, measurable service performance, effective documentation, and strong collaboration across IT, security, application teams, vendors, and business stakeholders.  

  

**Your main tasks will be:**


* Own and manage Azure infrastructure services, including service quality, availability, performance, security, compliance, lifecycle, and continuous improvement.
* Ensure stable and secure operation of Azure networking, core infrastructure resources, platform services, monitoring, logging, observability, secrets management, and automation.
* Drive continuous improvement of Azure infrastructure services, including standardization, automation, governance, cost optimization, operational maturity, and service reporting.
* Manage Azure infrastructure delivery through structured DevOps and GitOps practices, including repositories, pipelines, Infrastructure as Code, and controlled change processes.
* Define, maintain, and follow service management processes for incidents, problems, changes, service requests, documentation, and operational handovers.
* Collaborate closely with the security team to ensure Azure security controls, policies, identity, secrets, logging, and compliance requirements are implemented and maintained.
* Act as the main point of contact for Azure infrastructure service questions, escalations, priorities, risks, and improvement initiatives.
* Coordinate suppliers, internal teams, and stakeholders to ensure agreed service levels, operational expectations, and delivery commitments are met.
* Support budgeting, purchasing, license management.



 At Billerud, we put Safety First. Together we take great pride in our responsibility to contribute to a safe work environment. Please read more about our Safety First initiative here.


**Qualifications**
------------------



To succeed in this position, we believe you have Solid experience of (all or most):


* Solid experience in Azure infrastructure management, operations, governance, and lifecycle management.
* Good understanding of IT service management practices, including incident, problem, change, request, lifecycle, and vendor management.
* Experience with Azure networking, Azure policies, Azure PaaS services, monitoring, logging, and observability.
* Experience with Azure DevOps, GitOps, repositories, pipelines, controlled deployments, and Infrastructure as Code, preferably using Bicep.
* Strong understanding of cloud security principles, secure development lifecycle practices, identity, access, secrets management, and compliance requirements.
* Ability to translate technical platform needs into service requirements, operational processes, documentation, and stakeholder communication.
* Experience with cost management, license follow-up, supplier coordination, and budget input within a cloud or infrastructure environment.
* Strong planning, prioritization, communication, and collaboration skills.
* Ability to work independently while coordinating activities across internal teams, suppliers, security, and application stakeholders.
* Knowledge of PowerShell scripting or similar automation technologies is beneficial.
* We expect you to have at least 6 years of experience in similar roles.


**Personal qualities**
----------------------



For us, your personality is important. To succeed in this position, we believe you are:


* Service-oriented mindset with strong ownership of quality, reliability, structure, and continuous improvement.
* Ability to balance technical detail with business priorities, operational needs, and stakeholder expectations.
* Proactive, structured, and comfortable driving improvements across processes, tools, documentation, and ways of working.

  


Our values are very important for us and we believe that you recognize yourself in: We care for each other and We do what we say.


**Contact**
-----------



Åke Olsson, Senior Manager Global IT Network & Security



+4626151150



Ake.Olsson@billerud.com


**Application information**
---------------------------



Welcome with your application no later than July 13.  

  

Billerud is an equal opportunity employer. We embrace diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees and candidates.  

  

**Why us?**


* A full range in-house Global IT organization
* An opportunity to contribute to a more sustainable future
* Development and career opportunities
* Performance-based bonus, occupational pension and a number of different benefits according to company policy.

**Our recruitment process** will include interviews, recruitment test, reference checks, alcohol- & drug test as well as background checks. Applications will be reviewed during the application time.

  



The work will be largely onsite, with meetings and collaboration also taking place remotely through Teams  

Travelling to the HQ in Solna or to paper mills will be necessary

title: Molningenjör med efarenhet av Cloud Native-arkitektur
description:
Är du en driven och erfaren molnexpert med passion för att designa och optimera avancerade infrastrukturer? Combitech söker nu en ingenjör inom private cloud till vår verksamhet. I rollen kommer du att arbeta med cutting-edge teknologier och bidra till vår fortsatta utveckling inom molnplattformar. Hos oss får du möjlighet att sätta din prägel på innovativa molnplattformar, och du k ommer att vara avgörande för att ta våra projekt till nästa nivå.
  
  

Rollen
  
  

**I den här rollen ansvarar du för:**  

Design, implementation och drift av molninfrastruktur i produktionsmiljö.
  
  

Automatisering av deployment, konfiguration och drift via Infrastructure as Code.
  
  

Hantering av nätverk, säkerhet, IAM och loggning i molnmiljö.
  
  

Optimering av prestanda, skalbarhet och kostnad.
  
  

Bygga och underhålla CI/CD pipelines.
  
  

Kontinuerlig övervakning, incidenthantering och felsökning.
  
  

Integrering av containrar och containerorkestrering.
  
  

Samarbete med utvecklingsteam kring arkitektur och plattformstjänster.
  
  

Kravställning.
  
  

Vi söker dig som har
  
  

Minst fem års erfarenhet av arbete i molnplattformar och cloud native-arkitektur, med f örståelse för design av skalbar och distribuerad arkitektur.
  
  

Erfarenhet av KeyCloak, Nginx, och några av monitoreringsverkygen såsom Prometheus, OpenTelemetry eller Grafana.
  
  

Dokumenterad erfarenhet av Infrastructure as Code, exempelvis Terraform eller Pulumi, samt automation och scripting i Python, Bash eller PowerShell.
  
  

Mycket goda kunskaper i CI/CD, till exempel GitHub Actions, GitLab CI eller Azure DevOps .
  
  

Erfarenhet av containers och Kubernetes i produktion.
  
  

Fördjupade kunskaper inom nätverk i moln.
  
  

Erfarenhet av drift, övervakning och logghantering i moln.
  
  

God förståelse för säkerhetsprinciper i molnmiljö.
  
  

**Meriterande:** Erfarenhet av serverless tjänster, samt erfarenhet av dataplattformar i molnet.
  
  

Då tjänsten innebär arbete som omfattas av försvarssekretess krävs detatt du genomför och godkänns i en säkerhetsprövning med registerkontroll .
  
  

Urval sker efter sista ansökningsdatum pga semester . Vi ser fram emot din ansökan!
  
  

Kom & gör skillnad
  
  

Vi tror att man gör ett bättre jobb om man kan fokusera på rätt saker, därför gör vi det lätt att kombinera jobbet med vardagen. Vi satsar på våra medarbetare, de utgör kärnan, hjärnan och hjärtat i vår verksamhet. Dessutom står vi på en stadig grund av högteknologi, forskning och anställningstrygghet med försvars- och säkerhetskoncernen Saab som ägare.
  
  

Vill du veta mer om hur det är att arbeta hos oss?
  
  

**Kontaktperson/rekryterande chef:** Therese Elwing, therese.elwing@combitech.com
  
  

Vi undanber oss rekryteringssamarbeten.

title: Integrationsspecialist
description:
*Vill du vara med och driva digital innovation inom bank och försäkring? Som integrationsspecialist hos oss får du en nyckelroll nära både affären och tekniken, där moderna plattformar, AI-stöd och kontinuerligt lärande är en naturlig del av vardagen. Tillsammans med engagerade kollegor är du med och formar framtidens integrationslösningar i en öppen och inkluderande miljö.*



**Om jobbet**  

Som integrationsspecialist blir du en del av vårt integrationsteam med ett tydligt uppdrag: att säkerställa robusta, skalbara och framtidssäkra integrationslösningar som stödjer vår bank- och försäkringsverksamhet. Du arbetar nära både interna och externa parter i en outsourcad miljö och bidrar till att våra integrationsplattformar fungerar effektivt, säkert och med hög kvalitet. Rollen innebär stort eget ansvar, tät samverkan med andra team och möjligheten att vara en teknisk expert och rådgivare inom integrationsområdet, där AI-baserade verktyg är en naturlig del i hur vi arbetar.



Dina arbetsuppgifter kommer vara bland annat:


* Vidareutveckla och konfigurera lösningar för API-regler och vår automatiserade releasepipeline.
* Analysera behov, ta fram förslag, testa samt dokumentera förbättringar av integrationslösningar.
* Vara teknisk och funktionell expert på vår befintliga API-plattform och integrationsmiljö.
* Bevaka och hantera buggar, problem och incidenter kopplade till integrationer.
* Stötta API-producenter och konsumerande applikationer med granskning, testning, onboarding, felsökning och statistik.


**Vi har riktigt bra förmåner**
-------------------------------

Personalvillkor på bolån och blancolån


Rabatt på sak-, person- och djurförsäkring


Friskvårdsbidrag och friskvårdstimma


Lunchförmån


Fyra extra lediga dagar/år utöver semesterdagarna


Följande kommer göra dig framgångsrik i denna tjänst:


* Flera års erfarenhet av att arbeta med integrationer och minst 5 års erfarenhet som utvecklare.
* Dokumenterad erfarenhet av att utveckla och förvalta komplexa integrationslösningar.
* Mycket god förståelse för REST och RESTful design.
* Erfarenhet av API-plattformar.
* Erfarenhet av agila ramverk och arbetssätt (t.ex. Scrum, Kanban, SAFe).
* Erfarenhet av utveckling i något eller några av språken Python, PowerShell eller Java.
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta i Linux-miljöer.
* Relevant akademisk utbildning eller motsvarande arbetslivserfarenhet.
* Mycket goda kunskaper i både svenska och engelska, i tal och skrift.



Meriterande är även om du har:


* Erfarenhet av Azure DevOps och/eller Microsoft TFS CI/CD pipelines eller motsvarande CI/CD-teknik.
* Kunskap om och erfarenhet av OpenShift/Kubernetes/Docker.
* Förståelse för JWT och OAuth/OIDC.
* Erfarenhet av Git.
* Erfarenhet av Apache Camel.
* Erfarenhet av ActiveMQ, Confluent Kafka eller andra eventdrivna plattformar.



Som person är du nyfiken, engagerad och har ett starkt driv att utveckla både dig själv och teamet. Du trivs i en agil miljö, tar ansvar för ditt eget lärande och bidrar aktivt till förbättringsarbete. Du är lösningsorienterad, ödmjuk och stödjande gentemot kollegor, och du kommunicerar obehindrat med olika beställare och underleverantörer. Du uppskattar att arbeta i en inkluderande och innovativ miljö där du både får fördjupa din kompetens och påverka vilka tekniker och områden du arbetar mest med.



Om du är intresserad av vår teknik stack så arbetar vi inom bland annat följande tekniker i olika områden. Inom vår organisation så får du möjlighet att utvecklas och också påverka inom vilka områden du arbetar inom respektive tekniker som en del av vår kompetensutveckling.


* MFE — Micro Frontend
* React, TypeScript, Vite, Custom Elements (Web Components API), Shadow DOM, TanStack Query, LFDS, Vitest, MSW, NK-Bridge/CapKit
* Webbhybrid — Native mobilskal
* Swift (iOS), Kotlin (Android), WKWebView (iOS), Android WebView, WKScriptMessageHandlerWithReply (iOS), androidBridge.postMessage (Android), NK-Bridge/CapKit
* Mikrotjänster i Azure
* .NET (ASP.NET Core) eller Java (Spring Boot), Docker, ARO (OpenShift) eller ACA (Azure Container Apps), Azure Container Registry (ACR), Azure
* DevOps Pipelines, GitOps/ArgoCD, Managed Identity, Key Vault, External Secrets Operator
* API-design och publicering
* OpenAPI / Swagger, REST, Azure API Management (APIM), JWT, OAuth 2.0 / OIDC
* ODL — MongoDB Atlas och Cosmos DB
* Azure Cosmos DB (MongoDB API), MongoDB Atlas, Kafka (Confluent Cloud), Azure Key Vault



**Kontaktpersoner**  

Rekryterande chef: robert.zetterqvist@lansforsakringar.se  

Facklig representant Forena: jessica.loow@lansforsakringar.se  

Facklig representant Akademikerföreningen: Lisa-Maria.Carensjo@lansforsakringar.se

  

*Låter det spännande? Då vill vi veta mer om dig! Välkommen med din ansökan redan idag. Vi arbetar löpande med denna rekrytering och kan komma att tillsätta tjänsten innan sista ansökningsdag.*

**Observera att rekryteringsprocessen pågår under sommaren. På grund av semesterperioden kan återkoppling och handläggningstider vara något längre än vanligt. Vi tackar för ditt tålamod och ser fram emot din ansökan.**


  
Länsförsäkringar AB är en inkluderande arbetsplats där mod, möjligheter och engagemang står i centrum. Vi erbjuder ett hållbart arbetsliv med flexibla villkor och satsar på att alla medarbetare ska kunna växa och trivas, oavsett bakgrund.


Digital & IT är hjärtat i Länsförsäkringsgruppens digitala utveckling. Vi driver den gemensamma digitala transformationen och levererar förstklassiga IT-lösningar, datadrivna insikter och innovativa digitala tjänster som skapar värde för hela verksamheten. Vårt uppdrag är att bygga en robust och framtidssäker IT-miljö – både på plats och i molnet – som möjliggör kundnära och effektiva affärer i hela gruppen.



Hos oss möts teknik, affär och innovation. Vi arbetar tvärfunktionellt ute i verksamheten i agila team där utveckling, drift och strategi går hand i hand. Vi ansvarar för allt från IT-styrning, enterprisearkitektur och leverantörshantering till applikationsutveckling, cybersäkerhet och verksamhetsberedskap.


  
Robert Zetterqvist | Kontaktperson

title: Senior Cloud Operations Engineer
description:
**TL;DR**
 → Senior Operations Engineer in Redeploy's managed services team, keeping enterprise cloud environments running across Azure and AWS, 365 days a year.
   

  

 → Escalation point for the team and for clients: you coordinate incident response, unblock colleagues, and raise the bar technically.
   

  

 → More distinct environments and technical challenges in a year than most ops roles offer in five.
   

  

 What you'll do
   

  

 Run is Redeploy's managed services arm. Our operations teams own a broad portfolio of client cloud environments, taking full responsibility for their reliability, security and continuous improvement across both Azure and AWS. Clients range from regulated financial services organizations and large enterprise names to smaller, fast-moving companies. No on-prem, no physical infrastructure.
   

  

 As a Senior Operations Engineer, you take on the most complex challenges and support colleagues when they need it. When major incidents affect multiple client environments, you step in to coordinate the response: providing technical direction, sharing your expertise, and working closely with the team and stakeholders to resolution. Solving hard problems is part of it. Making the team around you better is what defines the role.
   

  

 A few examples of what this looks like in practice:
   

  

* Improving monitoring across client environments: Turning fragmented alerting setups into clear, actionable monitoring that reduces noise and helps the team respond faster.
* Leading incident response: Taking charge of critical incidents, working with the team to resolve issues under pressure, capture learnings, and drive lasting improvements.
* Automating repetitive operational work: Identifying manual tasks with the team and building automation that removes unnecessary effort and frees up time for higher-value work.
* Driving proactive service improvements: Reviewing operational patterns across client environments, identifying gaps in tooling, processes, or coverage, and turning them into improvements that raise reliability and the quality of service clients experience.


 What you get
   

  

**Breadth that builds you fast.** 
 A varied client portfolio means constant exposure to different architectures, stacks, and operational challenges. Regulated environments, enterprise-scale systems, multiple cloud setups: you'll build an operational range that single-client roles rarely match.
   

  

**Work that's hard to come by elsewhere.** 
 Few managed services roles give you direct, end-to-end ownership across a portfolio of this scale. You own the environments, the outcomes, and the quality.
   

  

**Your direction, your call.** 
 Go deeper into technical operations and resilience engineering, move towards a lead role within Run, or cross into Redeploy's Consulting side and grow towards architecture and advisory work. Colleagues have taken both paths.
   

  

**People who make you better.** 
 The people here care about the work. Engineers who go deep because they want to, hold themselves to a high standard, and get restless when things stop moving. Client satisfaction sits at around 96%, against an industry average of 85%. That number reflects the people, ownership and the care behind the work.
   

  

**The perks.** 
 30 days vacation
   

  

* hybrid work
* private medical insurance
* pension (ITP1)
* wellness allowance 5,000 SEK
* free choice of tools and tech
* free breakfast, soda and snacks
* yearly gatherings and AW's
* a team with genuine interests outside work: gaming, food, running, padel, golf, football, cycling Who you are


 You're structured and service-minded, and you take ownership without being told to. You're comfortable working independently, but you don't thrive alone: you want to be part of a team, contribute to something shared, and help the people around you improve. You ask questions about inherited tools and processes, and when you spot something that could be improved, you say so and do something about it.
   

  

 What you bring
   

  

* Solid hands-on experience with Azure and AWS cloud operations: AKS/EKS/K8, governance, compliance, security and AI-frameworks
* Experience with scripting, automation and infrastructure as code (Terraform), including building and maintaining CI/CD workflows
* Incident response and structured RCA, with a track record of turning findings into improvements
* Active user of AI-assisted tools such as Claude Code, Codex, or similar
* Fluency in Swedish and English


**Strong Plus**
* SRE practices: SLOs, SLIs, error budgets
* FinOps and cloud cost optimisation
* Advanced observability: metrics, logging, tracing
* ISO 27001 or structured security frameworks
* Background in financial services or other regulated industries/environments
* Experience mentoring engineers
* Relevant certifications


**About Redeploy**
 Redeploy is where cloud, data, and AI come together in production. We help Nordic enterprises design, build, and operate modern tech platforms and AI solutions that are secure, scalable, and production-ready. Engineers at heart, we work hands-on across Azure, AWS, and Databricks from strategy to operations.

title: Junior Platform Engineer
description:
Build something monumental for Healthcare!
   

  

 At Tandem Health we’re reimagining healthcare by putting clinicians first. Our platform - designed by clinicians, for clinicians - is built on deep insight into real-world pain points, with intuitive medical notes and workflows that truly support patient care.
   

  

 We’re a fast-scaling health-tech company backed by top investors and expanding globally. We move fast, stay curious, and believe building something that matters starts with an extraordinary team. If you're passionate about impact and innovation, we'd love to meet you!
   

  

**About The Role**
 You enjoy making systems work, not just writing code, but understanding how everything fits together underneath. You’ve probably spent time tinkering on your own, setting up servers, hosting things yourself, or trying to understand how infrastructure actually behaves in the real world.
   

  

 At Tandem, you’ll join a small, highly skilled platform team and help build the infrastructure that powers the future of European healthcare. You don’t need to know everything from day one - what matters most is your drive to learn, your curiosity, and your willingness to get your hands dirty.
   

  

 This role is focused on infrastructure first. You’ll work closely with experienced engineers, gradually taking ownership of parts of our platform and helping the team move faster by offloading and improving core infrastructure work. Along the way, you’ll learn how to build systems that are reliable, secure, and scalable in a highly regulated environment.
   

  

 If you’re someone who enjoys figuring things out, breaking and fixing systems, and continuously improving how things run - this is a great place to grow.
   

  

**What You Will Do**
* Support the team in building and maintaining cloud infrastructure that powers Tandem’s products.
* Work with Kubernetes-based systems and help improve how services are deployed and operated.
* Contribute to CI/CD pipelines, making deployments smoother and more reliable.
* Assist in implementing infrastructure-as-code using tools like Terraform and Helm.
* Help improve observability, monitoring, and alerting across our systems.
* Take ownership of smaller infrastructure components over time and help scale them.
* Work closely with senior engineers to learn best practices around reliability, security, and performance.


**What You Bring**
* Some experience working with cloud infrastructure (Azure, AWS, or GCP).
* Familiarity with Kubernetes, CI/CD, or infrastructure tooling - even if not at an expert level.
* Exposure to infrastructure-as-code tools like Terraform or Helm.
* Basic programming skills - enough to script, automate, and understand systems.
* A strong curiosity for how systems work under the hood.
* A mindset of learning and improvement - you’re eager to develop your skills quickly.
* Interest in building reliable systems that help others move faster.


**Bonus Points**
* You’ve built or run your own infrastructure projects (e.g. self-hosting, home labs, media servers, etc.)
* Experience working with slightly larger systems or production environments
* Familiarity with networking, security, or observability concepts
* Experience with Kubernetes packaging (e.g. Helm charts)
* Background in software engineering or scripting-heavy roles


 Location
   

  

 We believe the best ideas happen when we’re together. This role is based in our vibrant HQ in the Epicenter building in the heart of Stockholm where you will work primarily from our office to collaborate, connect, and build our culture.
   

  

**How To Apply**
 We adopt a continuous selection process, so please make sure to apply with your CV in English.
   

  

**Our Interview Process Consists Of 4 Stages**
* Screening interview with Talent Acquisition
* Technical interviews with some of our Engineers
* Interview with our CTO & Co-Founder
* Home case and presentation at our office - Join us in the Stockholm office for a lunch, a presentation to experience our our culture firsthand, collaborate with our team, and see how you work in action.


**Benefits**
* Competitive salary & company stock options
* 25 days/year of paid vacation
* Pension
* 5,000 SEK wellness allowance (friskvårdsbidrag)
* Social and team-building activities (off-sites, after works, winter/summer parties)
* An opportunity to make a real positive impact in the world of healthcare
* Work with some of the best minds in AI, healthcare, and engineering.


 Culture at Tandem
   

  

 At Tandem, we move fast, think big, and take ownership. We're a high-performing, diverse team with a shared drive to change the future of healthcare - and we’re just getting started.
   

  

 Our culture is built on action, ambition, and learning. You'll be trusted to take the lead, challenge yourself, and make an impact from day one. We believe real growth happens when you're stretched, supported, and surrounded by smart, passionate teammates who want to win together.
   

  

 Even though we’re spread across countries, we come together often in Sweden for team meetings, social events, and offsites - blending global reach with real human connection.
   

  

 We hire for talent, potential, and attitude - valuing different backgrounds and fresh perspectives. Great ideas come from everywhere, and we’re building a team that reflects the world we want to change.
   

  

*Tandem handles sensitive patient data and will conduct a background check before hiring any candidate.*

title: Azure Cloud Engineer
description:
Vill du ta din expertis inom Azure till nästa nivå? Vi söker en person med erfarenhet inom Microsoft Cloud som vill vara med och designa, bygga och optimera framtidens molnlösningar tillsammans med oss på Accelerate. Hos oss får du inte bara arbeta med moderna tekniker och spännande uppdrag, du blir en del av ett värderingsdrivet och passionerat team där du får goda möjligheter till personlig utveckling.
   

  

**Om rollen**
 Som Azure Cloud Engineer hos oss är du en nyckelspelare i att skapa stabila, säkra och moderna molnplattformar åt våra kunder. Du blir motorn bakom en friktionsfri resa från kod till produktion genom att automatisera, effektivisera och optimera kundernas Azure-miljöer. Vi ser dig som den som frigör kraften i molnet, så att utvecklingsteamen kan fokusera på innovation.
   

  

**Exempel På Vad Du Kommer Att Göra**
* Bygga och underhålla en modern, säker och skalbar infrastruktur i Azure med Infrastructure as Code.
* Hantera lösningar inom PaaS (Platform as a Service) och IaaS (Infrastructure as a Service), inklusive Azure VM, Azure Virtual Desktop, Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS), Azure Container Apps m.m.
* Säkerställa governance och compliance genom att implementera och hantera Azure Policy, RBAC och Workload Identity Federation.
* Optimera och implementera effektiva lösningar för monitorering och loggning med hjälp av Azure Monitor, Log Analytics och Application Insights.
* Säkerställa hög tillgänglighet och lösa komplexa utmaningar inom nätverk och säkerhet i Azure.


**Vem är du?**
 Vi söker dig som är har gedigen erfarenhet som Cloud Engineer och som brinner för Cloud lösningar såsom Azure, automation och säkerhet. Du har ett lösningsfokuserat mindset och vill hjälpa våra kunder att bygga hållbara och effektiva molnlösningar.
   

  

 Du uttrycker dig obehindrat på svenska och engelska i både tal och skrift. För denna position krävs svenskt medborgarskap, vi utför även bakgrundskontroll av slutkandidat.
   

  

**Vi Tror Att Du Gillar Att Jobba Med**
* Cloud Infrastruktur: Azure VM, Azure Network, Azure Virtual Desktop, Azure Kubernetes Services
* Azure-tjänster som Function Apps, App Services, Key Vault och Storage Accounts
* Säkerhet och compliance: Entra ID, Managed Identities, RBAC, Azure Policy, Microsoft Security
* Monitorering och loggning: Azure Monitor, Log Analytics, Application Insights
* Infrastructure as Code: som t ex Bicep
* Erfarenhet av att bygga cloudmiljöer enligt CAF (Cloud Adotions Framework) eller liknande.


**Plus Om Du Har**
* Certifieringar som AZ-104 och/eller AZ-204
* Erfarenhet av: Azure Landing Zones
* AZ-400, AZ-305 eller motsvarande


**Varför Accelerate?**
 Vi erbjuder dig mer än ett uppdrag – vi erbjuder en plattform för att växa som expert inom Microsoft Cloud så som Azure Infrastruktur, Azure DevOps och andra Microsoft Cloud lösningar! Hos oss får du chansen att arbeta i en modern och framtidsinriktad molnmiljö tillsammans med erfarna kollegor som är Microsoft MVP och Microsoft Certified Trainer inom Azure. Här blir du en del av en kultur där vi lär av varandra och bygger lösningar som verkligen gör skillnad hos våra kunder.
   

  

**Som Konsult Hos Oss Får Du**
* En skräddarsydd utvecklings- och certifieringsplan
* Utmanande och varierande uppdrag med de senaste teknikerna
* Flexibilitet, frihet och balans mellan jobb och fritid
* Kollektivavtal, friskvårdsbidrag och sjuk- och hälsoförsäkring
* Ett sammansvetsat team av vassa specialister som lyfter varandra
* En trygg och säker anställning med bra förmåner


 Vi tror på gemenskap och kompetensutbyte – här utvecklas vi tillsammans och stöttar varandra för att alltid ligga i framkant.
   

  

**Placeringsort**
 Accelerate finns på flertal orter i Sverige och Norge. För denna tjänst utgår du från vårt kontor i Stockholm, med möjlighet till hybridarbete.
   

  

 Önskad start är snarast eller enligt överenskommelse. Har du frågor? Kontakta Jesper Carlsson på jesper.carlsson@iver.se
   

  

**Vi ser fram emot att träffa dig! Välkommen till Accelerate**

title: Azure Infrastructure Service Manager
description:
**Job Description**
*At Billerud, we believe that when we keep tomorrow in mind, we will do our very best today. It is thanks to our employees that we are a world-leading company within the field of renewable paper and packaging materials. We work with sustainability at every stage to create a sustainable future – from product to people. Through our global programs, Sustainable Employees and Sustainable Leaders, we prioritize our employees – that they should grow with us and become more sustainable. Do you want to realize your true value and work for a sustainable tomorrow? Join us!*
**We are now looking for a Azure Infrastructure Service Manager**
 The Azure Infrastructure Service Manager is responsible for the end-to-end ownership, operational stability, lifecycle management, governance, and continuous improvement of Azure infrastructure services.
   

  

 The role ensures that Azure infrastructure is secure, reliable, scalable, cost-efficient, well-documented, and aligned with business, application, and security requirements.
   

  

 The role combines a solid understanding of Azure infrastructure with service management accountability. It ensures that Azure infrastructure services are delivered through clear ownership, defined processes, measurable service performance, effective documentation, and strong collaboration across IT, security, application teams, vendors, and business stakeholders.
   

  

**Your Main Tasks Will Be**
* Own and manage Azure infrastructure services, including service quality, availability, performance, security, compliance, lifecycle, and continuous improvement.
* Ensure stable and secure operation of Azure networking, core infrastructure resources, platform services, monitoring, logging, observability, secrets management, and automation.
* Drive continuous improvement of Azure infrastructure services, including standardization, automation, governance, cost optimization, operational maturity, and service reporting.
* Manage Azure infrastructure delivery through structured DevOps and GitOps practices, including repositories, pipelines, Infrastructure as Code, and controlled change processes.
* Define, maintain, and follow service management processes for incidents, problems, changes, service requests, documentation, and operational handovers.
* Collaborate closely with the security team to ensure Azure security controls, policies, identity, secrets, logging, and compliance requirements are implemented and maintained.
* Act as the main point of contact for Azure infrastructure service questions, escalations, priorities, risks, and improvement initiatives.
* Coordinate suppliers, internal teams, and stakeholders to ensure agreed service levels, operational expectations, and delivery commitments are met.
* Support budgeting, purchasing, license management.


 At Billerud, we put Safety First. Together we take great pride in our responsibility to contribute to a safe work environment. Please read more about our Safety First initiative here.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 To succeed in this position, we believe you have Solid experience of (all or most):
   

  

* Solid experience in Azure infrastructure management, operations, governance, and lifecycle management.
* Good understanding of IT service management practices, including incident, problem, change, request, lifecycle, and vendor management.
* Experience with Azure networking, Azure policies, Azure PaaS services, monitoring, logging, and observability.
* Experience with Azure DevOps, GitOps, repositories, pipelines, controlled deployments, and Infrastructure as Code, preferably using Bicep.
* Strong understanding of cloud security principles, secure development lifecycle practices, identity, access, secrets management, and compliance requirements.
* Ability to translate technical platform needs into service requirements, operational processes, documentation, and stakeholder communication.
* Experience with cost management, license follow-up, supplier coordination, and budget input within a cloud or infrastructure environment.
* Strong planning, prioritization, communication, and collaboration skills.
* Ability to work independently while coordinating activities across internal teams, suppliers, security, and application stakeholders.
* Knowledge of PowerShell scripting or similar automation technologies is beneficial.
* We expect you to have at least 6 years of experience in similar roles.


 Personal qualities
   

  

 For us, your personality is important. To succeed in this position, we believe you are:
   

  

* Service-oriented mindset with strong ownership of quality, reliability, structure, and continuous improvement.
* Ability to balance technical detail with business priorities, operational needs, and stakeholder expectations.
* Proactive, structured, and comfortable driving improvements across processes, tools, documentation, and ways of working.


 Our values are very important for us and we believe that you recognize yourself in: We care for each other and We do what we say.
   

  

 Contact
   

  

 Åke Olsson, Senior Manager Global IT Network & Security
   

  

 +4626151150
   

  

 Ake.Olsson@billerud.com
   

  

 Application information
   

  

 Welcome with your application no later than July 13.
   

  

 Billerud is an equal opportunity employer. We embrace diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees and candidates.
   

  

**Why us?**
* A full range in-house Global IT organization
* An opportunity to contribute to a more sustainable future
* Development and career opportunities
* Performance-based bonus, occupational pension and a number of different benefits according to company policy.


**Our recruitment process** 
 will include interviews, recruitment test, reference checks, alcohol- & drug test as well as background checks. Applications will be reviewed during the application time.
   

  

 The work will be largely onsite, with meetings and collaboration also taking place remotely through Teams
   

  

 Travelling to the HQ in Solna or to paper mills will be necessary
   

  

 Click here to apply for the job!
   

  

 Do you want to help create a sustainable future through your work?
   

  

 At Billerud, we are fully committed to reduce our and our customers carbon footprint by offering high-performance paper and packaging materials. We are convinced that the right solutions can be important tools to help fight climate change. That's why we see it as our responsibility to enable the best packaging choices, for a better tomorrow.
   

  

 Our proud history in the forestry and paper industry goes back more than 150 years. Since then, we’ve grown to what we are today: a world leading company in high-performing paper and packaging materials - passionately committed to sustainability, quality, and customer value. Our materials are the basis of packaging and paper products used by millions of people around the world, 24 hours a day, all year round.
   

  

 We serve customers in more than 100 countries through our three business areas Liquid Packaging Board, Paper and Paper Board. Our nine production units are located in Sweden, USA, and Finland and we have around 5,200 employees in 16 countries. Our annual turnover is approximately SEK 40.5 billion and the share is listed on Nasdaq Stockholm. At Billerud we always put safety first, care for each other, and do what we say.
   

  

 Join us in redefining sustainable packaging and drive meaningful change for a better tomorrow.

title: Site Reliability Operations Analyst
description:
**A World-Changing Company**
 Palantir builds the world’s leading software for data-driven decisions and operations. By bringing the right data to the people who need it, our platforms empower our partners to develop lifesaving drugs, forecast supply chain disruptions, locate missing children, and more.
   

  

**The Role**
 As a Site Reliability Operations Analyst you are the engine behind Palantir deployments. You are responsible for crafting, implementing and executing processes to streamline workflows and reduce friction. You track and stabilise projects, remove roadblocks, and anticipate customer needs to free up our engineers to focus their time and attention on the technical problems they are best equipped to solve.
   

  

 This position requires a combination of project management, process optimisation, and execution skills. You are a person who loves fixing problems and always embraces the best idea, even when it is not your own.
   

  

**Core Responsibilities**
* Work on many different types of problems and challenges. You might be supporting a deployment at a large, global customer one day, and jetting off across the world to help out with a new pilot project the next.
* Be the first responders when things go wrong. Even if a problem is outside your area of expertise, you make the first move to fix it, and only ask for help when we’ve exhausted all that we can possibly do.
* Craft and implement process to reduce friction and enable all team members to spend their time on what they do best.
* Think creatively, work collaboratively, and do whatever it takes to get the job done.


**What We Value**
* Extraordinary judgment and composure in high-pressure situations.
* A creative approach to project management centered around lightweight frameworks that enable rapid iteration and low-overhead methods of keeping our customers informed.
* Proven track record of developing effective and collaborative relationships with customers.
* Meticulous attention to detail, including maintaining accurate records and diligently tracking key project metrics.
* Enthusiasm for working on site with customers and/or supporting internal projects and senior leadership, bringing order and efficiency to critical internal initiatives.


**What We Require**
* Ability to travel 25-75%, varies by location and team.
* 3+ years of project/program management experience, preferably in a fast-paced or dynamic environment.
* Security clearance or the ability to obtain a clearance.
* Swedish language fluency.


**Life at Palantir**
 We want every Palantirian to achieve their best outcomes, that’s why we celebrate individuals’ strengths, skills, and interests, from your first interview to your longterm growth, rather than rely on traditional career ladders. Paying attention to the needs of our community enables us to optimize our opportunities to grow and helps ensure many pathways to success at Palantir. Promoting health and well-being across all areas of Palantirians’ lives is just one of the ways we’re investing in our community. Learn more at Life at Palantir and note that our offerings may vary by region.
   

  

 In keeping consistent with Palantir’s values and culture, we believe employees are “better together” and in-person work affords the opportunity for more creative outcomes. Therefore, we encourage employees to work from our offices to foster connectivity and innovation. Many teams do offer hybrid options (WFH a day or two a week), allowing our employees to strike the right trade-off for their personal productivity. Based on business need, there are a few roles that allow for “Remote” work on an exceptional basis. If you are applying for one of these roles, you must work from the city and or country in which you are employed. If the posting is specified as Onsite, you are required to work from an office.
   

  

 If you want to empower the world's most important institutions, you belong here. Palantir values excellence regardless of background. We are committed to making the application and hiring process accessible to everyone and will provide a reasonable accommodation for those living with a disability. If you need an accommodation for the application or hiring process , please reach out and let us know how we can help.
   

  

 Please note that you will never be asked to submit a payment or share financial information to participate in our interview process. If you suspect that you've been contacted by a scammer, we recommend you cease all communication with the individual and consider reporting them to the relevant authorities, such as the US FBI Internet Crime Complaint Center (IC3) .

title: Azure Integration Specialist
description:
**Är du en Azure integrationsspecialist som vill forma framtidens integrationslösningar? Med variation, mycket samarbete och en brant utvecklingskurva? Då kan vi vara rätt för dig.** 




  





 Uppdragen varierar och kan handla om allt från plattformsmodernisering och migrering till Azure, till att etablera en helt ny integrationsplattform samt att designa API:er och uppbyggnaden av dessa.
 



  





**Oavsett uppdrag får du:** 



* Designa och utveckla integrationer i Azure
* Jobba nära kund med kravställning och förståelse för verksamhetens behov
* Bidra till plattformsutveckling och kunskapsdelning i vårt integrationscommunity
* Utforska hur AI-agenter och orkestrerade flöden kan stötta integrationsarbetet hela vägen från krav till produktion
* På sikt växa mot en roll som integrationsarkitekt med fokus på Azure och plattformsarkitektur



  





**Vem vi tror att du är** 




 Vi vet att år på CV:t inte säger allt, samtidigt påverkar det uppdrags-möjligheter – en grundförutsättning som trygg arbetsgivare. För att matcha våra uppdrag ser vi gärna att du har:
 


* Några års erfarenhet av integrations- eller systemutveckling
* Praktisk erfarenhet av Azure Integration Services (t.ex. Logic Apps, Functions, Service Bus, API Management)
* God förmåga att kommunicera på svenska



  





**Ingen är perfekt, inte ens vi.** 




 Därför uppskattar vi transparens tidigt. Håller du med om dessa “trade-offs” kan vi vara en match:
 


* Trygghet med fast lön slår provisionsbaserad ersättning 💰
* Utveckling ser du som ett landskap att utforska, inte en enkelriktad titeltrappa 🗺️
* Inlyssnande och ärliga ledare & sälj-team hellre än tomma löften eller längre tid utan uppdrag 🫶🏻
* Att skapa värde för kund är viktigare än att jobba med ens favorit-teknikstack 💎



  





**Nyfiken på nästa steg?** 




 Vi letar inte efter perfekta CV:n, utan efter erfarna integrations- och molnprofiler som vill växa i konsultrollen. Skicka in din ansökan med CV eller LinkedIn och svara på några korta frågor som gör att vi snabbare kan få prata med dig! 📨
 



  





 Din arbetsort kan vara
 **Stockholm, Göteborg eller Malmö** 
 .
 



  





*Under juli månad kan vår återkoppling dröja något längre än vanligt då vi njuter av sommarledigheter. Vi hör av oss senast i augusti. Tack för ditt tålamod och önskar dig en riktigt fin sommar!* 




  





**Lästips under tiden 📑** 




 Vi vill gärna berätta massa mer men försöker hålla oss kortfattade till en början. Om du inte kan hålla dig tills vi hörs länkar vi tips på mer läsning här.
 



  




* **Solita vinner digitalt integrationsavtal för Öresundsbron värt 27 miljoner kronor**
* **Vårt arbete för att implementera en automations- och integrationsplattform på ONE Nordic**
* **Vår Integration Lead Rickard om sin tid på Solita**
* **Webinar med vår integrationskonsult Tomas om agentic AI (i Workato) inom retail**
* **Vår VD Johan om vår värderingsstyrda kultur och fokus på våra anställda**

title: Senior System Developer
description:
Do you thrive when code has a clear purpose – helping thousands of customers find the right product fast, on a global e-commerce platform. This role sits right where user experience, data, and engineering meet: building and evolving capabilities on Sandvik Coromant’s external web and e-commerce platform, guided by real user behavior and a strong product mindset.
   

  

**Why Sandvik Coromant?**
 Here, engineering doesn’t happen in a vacuum – development is connected to real customers, measurable outcomes, and a technical community that keeps moving forward. For you, this means long-term ownership, continuity, and room to grow with the platform. We offer you:
   

  

* A large development community and a tech-forward environment where modern tools are part of everyday work.
* A function of roughly 60 people with strong collaboration across roles and competences.
* An annual Innovation Week where every day work is put on hold and the entire focus is on experimenting, learning, and developing new ideas together.


**About The Job**
 This position is all about programming and product-oriented development – continuously improving capabilities on our web and e-commerce platforms. Work flows through an agile backlog in Azure DevOps, where features, enhancements, and improvements are shaped together with the product team. Full stack development is at the core: front-end experiences that feel effortless, and back-end services that stay reliable, secure, and scalable. Decisions are driven by data, tracking and learning from how users behave so the platform becomes even more user-friendly and, in turn, support sales. Your key stakeholders include the Product Owner and the wider product team – always with our customers in mind.
   

  

 Depending on the focus area, your day-to-day may also include:
   

  

* Building and refining integrations and APIs to support web capabilities.
* Working with product data and its complexity across systems.
* Exploring practical, AI-enabled ways of working as part of an ongoing AI journey, including tools such as GitHub Copilot and selected Azure AI services.


**Location and flexibility**
 The preferred location for this position is Sandviken or Stockholm.
   

  

**Your profile**
 For this senior role, we’re looking for someone who has deep experience in software development and a solid understanding of how AI is reshaping both technical solutions and ways of working. The role requires that you stay current and can take responsibility for technical decisions in a rapidly evolving environment.
   

  

 Here’s what helps you succeed:
   

  

* Knowledge in front-end development with Angular, CMS (Kontent.AI), CSS and Bootstrap.
* Knowledge in back-end development with C#, SQL, and REST APIs.
* Knowledge in everyday tooling such as Visual Studio Code, Visual Studio, GitHub, GitHub Copilot and Azure.
* Demonstrated skills in taking architectural decisions.
* Experience in agile ways of working in a product team and managing work through Azure DevOps.
* Comfortable working in a data-driven setup.
* Knowledge of Swedish and English in a professional setting.


 Skills nice to have:
   

  

* Experience with Duende.
* Familiarity with SAP back-end or working close to complex product data domains.


 Your collaborative, responsible way of working makes a real difference here. Your curiosity and initiatives are valued – bringing ideas forward, suggesting activities proactively, and enjoying the learning curve that comes with modern development and an evolving AI landscape. With a down-to-earth, prestige-free mindset, you help the team move fast together, share knowledge openly, and keep quality high.
   

  

**Some Words About Your New Team**
 This team builds applications within Marketing & Communications, with a clear focus on our external web and e-commerce platform. A wide range of competences sits close to the product work – supporting everything from web development and infrastructure to optimization and analytics – so collaboration happens naturally across roles. The shared goal is simple: make the web experience as user-friendly as possible, using data and insight to guide choices and create real value for customers.
   

  

**Our culture**
 Innovation is in our DNA and we’re proud to shape the future of manufacturing in close collaboration with our customers and partners. We believe in an inclusive, equal and open-minded culture, and we nurture our diversities to form a solid foundation for achieving great results. Add fair and rewarding benefits, as well as many different career opportunities in an inspiring global environment. Meet some of your future colleagues at our career page or visit our website, LinkedIn or Facebook page to get to know us further.
   

  

**Contact information**
 Are you curious to know more about this position? Please contact Hans Sundelin, hiring manager, at hans.sundelin@sandvik.com.
   

  

 We’ve already decided on which advertising channels and marketing campaigns we wish to use and respectfully decline any additional contact in that matter.
   

  

 Union contacts (Sweden):
   

  

* Thomas Lilja, Unionen, +46 (0)70-261 04 82
* Tord Engström, Akademikerföreningen, +46 (0)76 106 62 87
* Peter Olsson-Andrée, Ledarna, +46 (0)70-222 48 55


 Recruitment Specialist: Lotta Amnebjer Nordqvist
   

  

**How To Apply**
 We have an ongoing selection process in this recruitment and ask you to send your application as soon as possible and no later than August 23, 2026. Please note that the position may be filled before the application deadline, so we encourage you to apply as soon as possible. Please apply via the link with your resume (and a cover letter if you wish) in English. Please note that we don’t accept applications via email. Job ID: R0094227.
   

  

 At Sandvik, we value a healthy work-life balance and will be away on summer vacation. Therefore, it can be difficult to reach us, and the recruitment process might take longer than usual.
   

  

 As we aim for a fair recruitment process, we utilize assessment tools to safeguard objectivity. When you apply for this job, you will therefore receive an invitation via email to a personality and logic ability test. Feedback comes immediately after the test has been completed and the selection process begins after the application deadline.
   

  

 To learn more about our recruitment process, please visit our career site or contact HR Services at hrservices.sweden@sandvik.com

title: Lead Builder - Next Generation Counter UAS Mission System
description:
*Vill du påverka och göra skillnad på riktigt? Här bidrar du till att skapa trygghet för människor och samhällen. Det du gör spelar roll.*
 Din roll
   

  

 Vi bygger nästa generations C5ISR-plattform för multi-domäna operationer. Som en del av detta utvecklar vi en ny Counter-UAS mission system-förmåga ovanpå plattformen, från sensorintegration och fusion till operatörsflöden, beslutstöd och effektsamordning.
   

  

 Nu söker vi dig som vill leda framtagandet av mission system (on-keyboard). Det här är inte en traditionell förvaltnings- eller projektledarroll. Vi söker en tekniskt tung lead builder som vill vara med och bygga en ny operativ förmåga från grunden och skapa det team som behövs.
   

  

 Du blir ansvarig för att leda framtagandet av vår nästa generations Counter-UAS Mission system på vår nya C5ISR-plattform. Rollen innebär att vara djupt involverad i koncept, arkitektur, prioriteringar och implementation tillsammans med plattformsteam och domänspecialister. Rollen är hands-on och kräver både tekniskt djup och förmåga att driva fram riktning och tempo.
   

  

 Du kommer även att forma och mobilisera den kompetens som krävs för att realisera förmågan, både genom nära samverkan med andra delar av organisationen och genom externa resurser vid behov.
   

  

 Arbetet sker i en modern, AI-native utvecklingsmiljö med fokus på:
   

  

* Distribuerade system
* Realtidsdata och fusion
* Edge / cloud-arkitektur
* Sensor- och effektorintegration
* API- och dataplattformsdriven utveckling
* AI-accelererade utvecklingsflöden


 Det här är en möjlighet att vara med och definiera hur framtidens Counter-UAS-förmågor byggs - tekniskt, operativt och organisatoriskt.
   

  

 Tjänsten är placerad i Solna.
   

  

 Din profil
   

  

 Vi tror att du:
   

  

* Har erfarenhet av att bygga komplexa mjukvarusystem – inte bara koordinera dem
* Kan ta en idé från whiteboard till fungerande operativ förmåga
* Är bekväm nära kod, arkitektur och tekniska beslut
* Har förståelse för mission system, sensorsystem, taktiska system eller försvarsnära lösningar
* Trivs i miljöer där mycket fortfarande formas och där tempo är viktigt
* Har förmåga att skapa struktur, riktning och teknisk kvalitet i ett nytt område
* Kan leda seniora utvecklare och specialister mot ett gemensamt mål


 Vi söker dig som inte bara följer utvecklingen inom agentisk AI, utan ligger i framkant och redan experimenterar - i arbetet, på fritiden eller båda. Du har energi, teknisk nyfikenhet och driv att lära dig snabbt, testa nytt och omsätta moderna verktyg i verklig produktutveckling.
   

  

 Du trivs i miljöer där förutsättningarna inte är fullt ut satta, där utforskande och innovation är en del av vardagen. Du motiveras av att bygga nya förmågor tillsammans med andra skickliga människor – och av att se idéer bli verklighet.
   

  

 Befattningen kräver att du genomgår och godkänns enligt vid var tid gällande bestämmelser för säkerhetsskydd. För befattningar där Saab har krav på säkerhetsklassinplacering kan, i förekommande fall, medföra krav på visst medborgarskap.
   

  

**Vad du blir en del av**
 Upptäck oändliga möjligheter. Anta utmaningar, skapa smarta innovationer och uppgradera dina förmågor. Det här är en plats för kluriga tänkare, modiga pionjärer och alla däremellan. Tillsammans uppnår vi det extraordinära, var och en tar med sitt unika perspektiv. Varje bidrag räknas.
   

  

 Saab är ett ledande försvars- och säkerhetsföretag med uppdrag att hjälpa nationer att skydda sin befolkning och bidrar till trygghet för människor och samhällen. Med 26,100 talangfulla medarbetare utvecklar Saab teknik och lösningar för en säkrare och mer hållbar värld.
   

  

 Saab utvecklar, tillverkar och underhåller avancerade system inom flygteknik, vapen, ledningssystem, sensorer och undervattenssystem. Saab har sitt huvudkontor i Sverige men en global verksamhet där Saab är en del av många nationers försvarsförmåga. Läs mer om oss här.
   

  

 Vänligen observera att vi arbetar med löpande urval och tjänsten kan komma att tillsättas innan sista ansökningsdatum har gått ut.
   

  

 Varmt välkommen med din ansökan!

title: Fullstackutvecklare till Karolinska Universitetssjukhuset
description:
Karolinska Universitetssjukhuset söker en senior systemutvecklare för att stärka utvecklingen inom precisionsmedicin, med fokus på systemstöd för medicinska diagnostikflöden. Uppdraget genomförs i nära samarbete med hälsoinformatiker och omfattar vidareutveckling av lösningar för hantering av labbprover, beställningar, svar och genomikdata.
   

  

 Arbetet präglas av höga krav på datakvalitet, spårbarhet, informationsflöden och integration mellan system. Konsulten förväntas arbeta självständigt, driva tekniska lösningar framåt och bidra på en övergripande nivå i design och koordinering.
   

  

 Omfattning och upplägg
   

  

* Start: preliminärt 2026-08-21
* Omfattning: 100%
* Längd: till 2026-12-31, med möjlighet till förlängning
* Plats: Karolinska i Solna (upp till 50% distans möjligt)


 Krav (ska-krav)
   

  

* Erfarenhet som systemutvecklare i webbaserade lösningar
* Erfarenhet av frontendutveckling i moderna JavaScript-ramverk (t.ex. React) inkl. UI/UX
* Erfarenhet av backendutveckling i moderna plattformar (t.ex. .NET, Java eller likvärdigt)
* Minst två relevanta referensuppdrag av liknande omfattning och komplexitet
* Förmåga att arbeta självständigt, ta ansvar och hantera dialog med både interna och externa intressenter


 Mervärden (bör-krav)
   

  

* Erfarenhet från vård, diagnostik eller laboratorienära verksamhet med fokus på datakvalitet och informationsflöden
* Erfarenhet av containerplattformar (t.ex. Kubernetes eller OpenShift)
* Erfarenhet av CI/CD och moderna utvecklingsflöden


**NÄR DU BLIR PARTNER**
 Som partnerkonsult hos Wise kliver du in i en gemenskap där samarbete är kärnan. Du får möjlighet att arbeta med några av marknadens mest intressanta uppdrag, i organisationer där både människor och teknik är i centrum. För oss är det avgörande att du känner dig trygg och värdesatt i vårt samarbete. Vi stöttar dig, coachar dig och finns med dig hela vägen genom uppdraget. Hos oss är du inte bara konsult – du blir en del av en större helhet.
   

  

**OM WISE IT**
 Wise IT är specialister på rekrytering, konsultlösningar och strategisk kompetensmatchning inom IT och tech. Teknik förändras snabbt , men med rätt person på rätt plats får du kontroll på framtiden. Vi matchar människor med skarp teknisk kompetens och förmågan att förstå helheten. Resultatet? IT som fungerar i praktiken, inte bara i teorin. Vi ser till att du inte bara följer utvecklingen utan driver den.
   

  

**DIN ANSÖKAN // TALENT SPEAKS LOUDER**
 För att söka rollen klicka på ”Ansök nu”, samt bifoga CV. Notera att vi ej kan ta emot ansökningar via mail. I konsultvärden går det ofta snabbt så tjänsten kan komma att tillsättas innan sista ansökningsdatum. Vänta därför inte med din ansökan.

title: Integration Architect
description:
**Ta chansen och kom in som Integration Architect hos oss där du får samarbeta med andra experter inom integration, data, AI och cloud. Tillsammans formar vi framtidens integrationslandskap – där smarta arkitekturella val möjliggör innovation, effektivitet och hållbarhet.** 




  





 Inom vår Connectivity-enhet på Solita har vi över 20 års erfarenhet av integration och processautomation – och vår passion för att hjälpa kunder att skapa robusta, skalbara och framtidssäkra lösningar är lika stark idag som när vi började. Genom att använda den senaste tekniken inom API-design, molnintegration och DevOps säkerställer vi inte bara snabb leverans av affärsvärde, utan också effektiva kopplingar mellan system och dataflöden.
 



  





**En dag på Solita** 




  





 En dag på Solita kan ofta börja med ett standup-möte med kund och dina team-medlemmar, där ni planerar dagens arbete, går igenom prioriteringar och identifierar eventuella utmaningar. Sen kliver du in i ditt arbete: kanske jobbar du med att skissa upp en integrationslösning baserat på en kravspec eller säkerställer att en lösning följer etablerade arkitekturella principer och styrningsmodeller. Du jobbar även ofta med att stötta integrationsutvecklare i den tekniska uppsättningen av en ny plattform.
 



  





 Under dagen kan det dyka upp ad-hoc möten med kund, kollegor som behöver stöttning eller helt enkelt att du lyssnar på våra interna utbildningsmöten; infosessions, som kan handla om allt relaterat till Solita och branschen. Dagen fortsätter ofta med kodnära arbete, möten med kollegor och kund och inte minst – fika!
 



  





**Axel Lundh** 
 som jobbar som Integration Architect hos oss, beskriver sitt nuvarande uppdrag:
 



  





*“Jag arbetar som Azure-integrationsarkitekt med ansvar för att designa och bygga integrationsplattformar i Microsoft Azure. Mitt arbete fokuserar på att omsätta verksamhetsbehov till robusta tekniska lösningar, samt att skapa förutsättningar för effektiva och välfungerande utvecklingsteam. I rollen leder jag det tekniska arbetet inom mina projekt och definierar arkitektur, principer och ramverk som styr hur integrationer och applikationer utformas. Jag utvecklar och förvaltar plattformskomponenter, CI/CD-pipelines, säkerhetslösningar och infrastrukturlager med hjälp av teknologier som Azure DevOps, Terraform, Bicep och C#. Jag arbetar nära utvecklingsteamen för att ge tekniskt stöd, säkerställa god kvalitet i leveransen och driva förbättringar i både arbetssätt och lösningsdesign.”* 




  





**Din roll som Integration Architect** 




  





 Som Integration Architect på Solita ansvarar du för att forma den tekniska visionen kring hur system kommunicerar och integrerar på ett säkert, skalbart och hållbart sätt. Du designar och definierar den övergripande integrationsstrategin och -arkitekturen, väljer rätt teknologi och mönster, samt ser till att lösningarna stödjer kundens långsiktiga affärs- och IT-strategier.
