title: Space Planner
description:
Har du framgångsrikt drivit space-projekt inom retail och söker en roll där din erfarenhet faktiskt gör skillnad? Vill du kliva in i en nyckelroll med ett brett mandat, där du får forma hela butikens försäljningsyta och på sikt växa in i ett större ledaransvar? Då har vi rollen för dig!


**Om tjänsten och uppdraget**


Byggmax är en av Nordens mest framgångsrika konceptkedjor. Det innebär att allt vi gör har en tydlig struktur, men det betyder också att den optimering du gör i våra verktyg får en enorm utväxling på butiksgolvet. Vi befinner oss just nu i en spännande utvecklingsfas där vi lyfter vår kommersiella standard, fördjupar vår analys och optimerar produktexponeringen för att maximera lönsamheten. Som Space Planner hos oss sitter du inte bara på en avdelning och verkställer, du förväntas ta ett tydligt ägarskap. Rollen är både strategisk, analytisk och operativ. Du kommer bland annat att driva och testa dina koncept i vår utvalda experimentbutik i Stockholm för att säkerställa optimal funktion och kundvarv innan storskalig utrullning i butiksledet. Vi söker dig som vill ha ett genuint ansvar och som motiveras av att driva utveckling. För rätt person, som framgångsrikt kommersialiserar våra ytor och visar naturliga ledaregenskaper, finns det mycket goda möjligheter att på sikt axla ett framtida ledaransvar inom teamet.


**Dina huvudsakliga arbetsuppgifter**


* Optimera och utveckla planogram och produktexponering i space-verktyget Spaceman.
* Analysera sortiment, lönsamhet och kundbeteende för att fatta datadrivna beslut som påverkar köpbeslut i butik.
* Optimera hanteringskostnader i butik
* Skapa och leda arbete genom tydliga processer, samt ta fram instruktioner och guidelines för butiksorganisationen.
* Samarbeta tätt med inköp, sortimentsutveckling och butiksorganisationen för att säkra det kommersiella kunderbjudandet.
**Några av våra medarbetare**
-----------------------------


Charlotte Lotta Westerlind
Regionchef, Byggmax region Väst
*"Det finns ett glödande engagemang hos alla i Byggmax!"*
Farshad Shahrestani
Platschef Byggmax butik
*"Jag har vunnit på lotto som får jobba på Byggmax!"*
Anders Lindberg
Säkerhet och processansvarig
*"Jag trivs på Byggmax för att jag har så roligt på jobbet!"*
Disa Malmgren
Butiksmedarbetare Byggmax Luleå
*"Jag har världens bästa chef som är omtänksam och härlig!"*
**Kvalifikationer**
-------------------


**Vem är du?**
  

För att lyckas i rollen är du analytisk, strukturerad och kommunikativ. Du har förmågan och modet att driva processer framåt och kan utmana nuvarande arbetssätt på ett konstruktivt och utvecklande sätt. Du har en gedigen retail-förståelse och motiveras av att se direkta resultat av ditt arbete på butiksgolvet.


**Kvalifikationer:**


* Flera års erfarenhet av arbete inom Space Planning / Space Management i en retailorganisation.
* Gärna erfarenhet från sällanköpshandel eller dagligvaruhandel.
* Goda kunskaper inom Category Management, kundbeteende och varukedjan.
* Erfarenhet av relevanta Space-verktyg, där Spaceman eller motsvarande (t.ex. Nielsen/JDA) väger tyngst.
* Flytande kunskaper i svenska och engelska, i både tal och skrift.

**Meriterande:**


* Erfarenhet av Store Planner-verktyg som Archicad eller Revit.
* Erfarenhet av system som Excel, Relex, IFS, Power BI eller Qlik Cloud.

**Varför Byggmax?**
  

Vi erbjuder en arbetsplats med stor frihet och möjlighet att påverka. Hos oss möts du av en stark kultur, sammansvetsade team och en genuin laganda.


* **Flexibilitet:** Rollen utgår från vårt Servicekontor i Lindhagen, Stockholm, med möjlighet till flexibilitet när arbetet tillåter.
* **Förmåner:** Kollektivavtal, tjänstepension, friskvårdsbidrag och självklart personalrabatt så att du kan förverkliga dina egna byggdrömmar!
**Vi har riktigt bra förmåner**
-------------------------------


* Goda utvecklingsmöjligheter
* Friskvård och balans i livet
* Personalrabatt i flera av våra koncernbolag
* Stark entreprenöriell anda
* Värderingsstyrd kultur
* Pensionsavsättningar
**Om företaget**
----------------


Alla hemmasnickare ska kunna förverkliga sina byggdrömmar, det tycker i alla fall vi på Byggmax. Oavsett om det handlar om inomhus-, utomhus- eller trädgårdsprojekt. Därför jobbar alla Byggmaxare mot samma mål: att ge dessa hemmasnickare både råd och möjlighet till det!


Byggmax har totalt över 190 butiker fördelat i Sverige, Norge och Finland. Utöver de fysiska butikerna finns även en ständigt växande e-handel. Sedan starten 1993 har Byggmax haft som affärsidé att vara det bästa och billigaste alternativet för hobbysnickare och proffs som vill köpa byggmaterial av bra kvalitet. Vi har gått från att vara en ettrig uppstickare till att bli en av Sveriges största byggmaterialkedjor. Med hjälp av ständiga förbättringar, löpande effektiviseringar och en förändringsbenägen företagskultur har bolaget blivit ett av branschens lönsammaste. I koncernen Byggmax Group ingår även Skånska Byggvaror, Buildor, Right Price Tiles och Næstved Lavpristræ.


Varmt välkommen till Byggmax, både som kund och som potentiell medarbetare!

  

  

Enable "functional cookies" to watch the video


TOMTOM


AnsvarJag står för det jag tänker, säger och gör. Jag håller det jag lovat och agerar alltid utifrån Byggmax bästa.


Positiv attitydJag väljer att alltid se möjligheter och lösningar. Med mitt positiva sätt att tänka ger jag energi till laget och våra kunder. Allt är möjligt!


RoligtJag ser alla som fantastiska och sprider glädje genom att bjuda på mig själv och mitt leende. Då får vi alla kul tillsammans!!


RespektJag ser, lyssnar och försöker förstå alla i min omgivning. Genom att behandla alla andra som jag själv vill bli behandlad bygger vi starka och bra relationer.


EngagemangJag bjuder på mig själv och ger det lilla extra. Jag är aktivt delaktig och visar ett genuint intresse för både kollegor och kunder.


TillsammansTillsammans prioriterar vi helheten och pratar direkt med varandra.


100%Jag gör alltid mitt bästa och är närvarande Vi ska vara världens bästa bygghandel.

title: Customer Support Agent to TaxiCaller
description:
TaxiCaller is on a mission to transform the transportation industry, providing cloud-based dispatch and booking solutions to taxi and transport companies around the world. We’re growing steadily, profitable, and supporting customers across multiple continents every day.
  
We are now looking for a new Customer Support Agent to join our team in Linköping.
  
This is a great opportunity for someone who enjoys structure, organisation and working in a fast-moving software environment, even if you don’t come from a technical background.
  
  

About the role
  
In this role, you’ll support our customer support organisation with a mix of operational, administrative and support-related tasks that help keep things running smoothly behind the scenes.
  
Your daily work will include customer account administration, onboarding-related tasks, quality assurance checks and helping maintain internal documentation and support resources. You’ll also assist different teams with follow-ups, coordination and general operational support when needed.
  
The role is ideal for someone who is organised, detail-oriented and comfortable working with modern software and digital tools. You do not need a technical education or previous experience in software development, but you should feel comfortable using computers, email systems, mobile devices and online platforms.
  
This is considered an entry-level position, and we care more about mindset, reliability and willingness to learn than formal qualifications.
  
  

**We think you’ll fit well in this role if you:**  

* Are organised and pay strong attention to detail.
* Enjoy structured tasks and working methodically.
* Are curious and interested in learning how software platforms work.
* Communicate clearly and professionally in English, both verbally and in writing.
* Are comfortable working with computers and mobile applications.
* Learn quickly and enjoy working in a team environment.
* Take ownership of your work and follow tasks through carefully.


**It will be considered an advantage if:**  

* You speak additional languages, especially Swedish, Finnish, French or Spanish.
* You have previous experience in customer service, administration or support roles.
* You have experience working with software platforms, SaaS products or mobile applications.
* You are comfortable handling multiple tasks while maintaining accuracy and attention to detail.


Why join TaxiCaller?
  
We’re a growing international software company where your work has a direct impact on both our customers and our internal teams. You’ll work closely with experienced colleagues across support, sales, development and account management, while gaining hands-on experience in a global SaaS environment.
  
As we continue to grow, so will the opportunities to develop within the company.
  
  

**You can learn more about working with us here:** https://www.taxicaller.com/en/careers and here www.linkedin.com/company/taxicaller.
  
Recruitment will continue until we feel we’ve found the right fit, so we recommend applying as soon as possible and we look forward to hearing from you!

title: Architecture Manager (Ingka Centres)
description:
"You care about making a positive impact in the world. You understand greatness requires thinking differently. An inclusive and accepting work environment is important to you.



A job at IKEA is so much more than home furnishings. Together, we work to make a better everyday life for the many. It's the perfect fit if you want to contribute, grow, and share. Join the team and start a better life for yourself."



* Locations

	+ Malmö, Sweden
* Employment Types

	+ Permanent
* Department
IT & Digital Solutions
* Full/Part Times

	+ Full Time

  
Candidate profile (title) Who you are
Candidate profile (text) - Default language Do you want to shape how technology enables the future of meeting places? We’re now looking for an Architecture Manager who thrives at the intersection of business and technology, and who enjoys leading people, setting direction, and simplifying complexity.  

  

  

  

At Ingka Centres, we are on a transformation journey where digital and technology play a key role in creating inspiring, relevant, and seamless experiences for our visitors and communities. In this role, you will be a key contributor to securing a future-proof IT landscape that supports our business ambitions.
  

  

You are a strategic and hands-on leader with strong experience in architecture and team leadership. You feel comfortable navigating complex environments and turning business needs into clear, structured technology direction.  

  

  

  

  

We believe you bring:
  

  

* Extensive experience within technology architecture and leadership (7–10+ years)
* Several years of people leadership experience, with a strong focus on coaching and developing others
* Strong knowledge of enterprise architecture, including systems, platforms, integrations, and information security
* Experience working in complex, international environments with multiple stakeholders
* A proven ability to connect business strategy, operating models, and technology direction
* A passion for simplifying complexity and driving structured, effective ways of working
* Motivation to lead through people, develop capabilities, and continuously improve
* A leadership style grounded in IKEA values and culture
Key responsibilities (title) A day in your life with us
Key responsibilities (text) As Architecture Manager, you will lead the architecture area and ensure that our technology landscape is robust, scalable, and aligned with business needs, today and in the future.
  

  

You will work closely with business and digital stakeholders to define direction, remove complexity, and enable teams to deliver with speed and quality.  

  

  

  

  

Among other things, you will:
  

* Define and lead the strategic direction and target architecture for the Centres IT landscape
* Ensure alignment between business strategy, digital roadmap, and architecture direction
* Lead and coach leaders and co-workers within the architecture area, building strong capabilities and ways of working
* Drive architecture principles, standards, and governance, including security and compliance
* Support teams in designing and evolving solutions, reducing technical debt and increasing scalability
* Ensure integration, API, and data architecture enable end-to-end business processes
* Stay close to industry trends and continuously evolve practices, including cloud and emerging technologies
* Collaborate across teams to remove dependencies and enable smooth delivery

  

You will also play an important role in developing how we work with architecture across Ingka Centres, driving consistency, simplicity, and long-term thinking.
Team vision ( title) Together as a team
Team vision (text) Together with IKEA Retail and Ingka Investments, Ingka Centres is part of Ingka Group.
  

  

We are on a journey to transform our meeting places into vibrant destinations where people can meet, connect, shop, and be inspired. Digital and technology are at the heart of this transformation, enabling better customer experiences and stronger business performance.
  

  

You will be part of the Commercial & Digital domain, and you will report to the Ingka Centres Digital Manager. acting as an engine for innovation, growth, and future-ready solutions that support both business and customer needs.
  

  

We are a team that values collaboration, simplicity, and continuous learning, always with our culture and values at the core.
Let's connect Questions and support? Let's connect!
Let´s connect Maybe you’re wondering about something or want to learn more about the role or the team?
  

  

For job-specific questions, feel free to reach out to the hiring manager, Jonas Karlsson, jonas.karlsson1@ingka.com.
  

  

For questions about the recruitment process, you’re welcome to contact the recruiter Emelie.nilfeldt@ingka.ikea.com
  

  

We’d love to hear from you — don’t hesitate to get in touch!
  

  

We review applications on an ongoing basis, but due to the summer period, we will take a short break in the recruitment process and resume in August.
  

  

Please submit your application as soon as possible, but no later than 2026-08-09
### **Why you will love us**

From the deep forests in Sweden, we have spread our culture and values around the world. At the heart of our offer are our beautiful home-furnishing products and solutions, made with care for our planet, reaching millions of customers.  

  

  

At the heart of our business, are our wonderful co-workers representing diversity in all dimensions and passionate for life at home. We all contribute with our uniqueness and we want to grow and develop together.  

  

  

Our vision, “to create a better everyday life for the many people” inspires and guides us in everything we do. This is IKEA.
### **What we all have in common**


* Living our values
* Being your unique self, while respecting and including others
* A passion for home furnishing
* Performing & delivering while learning & developing
* Having fun!
company_description: At IKEA, we share an inspiring vision: “to create a better everyday life for the many people”.

title: Digital Graphic Designer
description:
**HAYPP GROUP**


We address one of the world’s biggest problems – how to end smoking. There are 1,1 billion smokers in the world. Around 8 million people die every year from smoking-related diseases. Our goal is to significantly reduce death rates, save lives and inspire people to choose smoke-free enjoyment. How? By offering people other nicotine products online.


Haypp Group is one of the Nordics’ leading e-commerce groups with eleven store brands, present in seven countries where we serve more than 1 million active consumers. Through brands such as Snusbolaget.se, Northerner.com, Nicokick.com etc., we sell nicotine pouches, Swedish style snus online as well as disposable vapes. With our headquarters located on Östgötagatan in Stockholm we are 300 team members mainly but not exclusively based in Sweden. Also, we are an innovative and fast-moving company that is growing rapidly, driving sustainable business and are changing the world in the process. We are currently on an exciting expansion journey, converting more and more smokers to smoke-free alternatives across all our markets globally.

 **THE ROLE**


We’re looking for a creative, driven Digital Graphic Designer to join Haypp Group’s Center of Excellence (CoE) Content team, supporting all markets with their graphic needs. You’ll play a key role in producing creative templates and high-quality graphics, motion design, and videos for our e-commerce stores across 5 markets. Your work will elevate the customer experience from category pages and brand sites to articles, campaigns, and paid ads.
  

  

You’ll collaborate closely with writers, SEO specialists, brand managers, and performance teams helping us build scalable workflows that enable fast production across multiple brands, languages, and channels. We encourage you to explore AI tools to speed up ideation, production, and iteration.

 **YOUR RESPONSIBILITIES:**

**Graphic Design:** Create visually compelling layouts, banners, and illustrations for web and mobile.

**Motion Design:** Develop animated elements and micro-interactions for digital channels.

**Video Production:** Plan, shoot, and edit product videos, tutorials, social-first formats, and campaign films.

**Paid Creative:** Adapt and optimize assets for paid channels (social media, display, programmatic) with strong CTAs and A/B variations.

**Brand Consistency:** Ensure alignment with brand guidelines and collaborate with content, SEO, and performance teams.

**Workflow Efficiency:** Contribute to templating (e.g., in Figma, Bannerflow & Frontify), component libraries, and processes that scale across brands and languages.

**Innovation:** Stay updated on trends, formats, and tools and experiment with AI-driven workflows where they add value.  

  



**WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR:**

* 3+ years of experience in graphic design for digital channels, plus motion design and video production.

* Strong proficiency in Figma and Adobe Creative Cloud (especially After Effects, Premiere Pro, Photoshop, Illustrator).
* Understanding of paid media and how creative choices impact CTR and conversions; experience with channel-specific formats.
* Ability to manage multiple projects in a fast-paced environment and meet deadlines.
* A keen eye for typography, colour, composition, and accessibility.
* Nice to have: Experience in e-commerce, multi-brand/multi-market setups, basic colour grading/sound editing, and interest in AI-assisted creative production.
* Languages: English (professional level)
**WHAT WE OFFER**


We are a value driven company with our values *We team up*, *Innovation Drives Us*, *Inclusion and Non-Hierarchy* and *Going the Extra Mile* at the heartbeat of everything that we do. With us you can always expect to get help from people who want to achieve things together and to be able to speak your mind in every social constellation you are part of. We highly value all ideas no matter where they come from, and we are not afraid to try new things out. We are also welcoming, inclusive and everyone at Haypp Group has a voice. In addition, we seize opportunities by putting in hands-on, hard work and celebrating when we reach our goals. With us, you should always feel safe, appreciated and valued but at the same time challenged and excited.


Because we recognize that our team members are our most important differentiator, we offer our team members generous benefits. We offer the following perks to everyone at Haypp Group:

* Competitive occupational pension
* Insurance plan, including private healthcare
* 30 days of paid vacation
* Parental pay lift
* Wellness allowance of 5,000 SEK per year
* Lots of social happenings

 **As many of us will be on summer holidays, things may move a bit slower during mid-July. We will continuously review applications, but plan to pick up pace again and start conducting interviews in August.**

**In the meantime, feel free to check out our** **website** **if you are interested in learning more about us and what we're currently up to!**

**SEND US YOUR APPLICATION TODAY!**


If this sounds like a place where you would want to contribute and grow, let us know you’re interested by submitting your application!


Haypp Group is committed to equality and diversity, and we welcome applications from all qualified individuals regardless of ethnicity, religion, age, gender, sexual orientation, disability, and marital status. We want to offer you great recruitment experience, and if there is anything we can do to make you more comfortable in the process with us, please let us know.

  

If you have any questions about the role or what it’s like to work at Haypp Group in general, feel free to reach out to our responsible recruiter Lea Sjösten at lea.sjosten@hayppgroup.com. We look forward to hearing from you!

title: VP Engineering
description:
**VP Engineering | Stockholm | Fintech | Hybrid** 




  





 edenity partners with companies at inflection points; moments where engineering organisations need to evolve structurally, not just incrementally.
 



  





 More on us here.
 



  





 We’re supporting a Nordic fintech operating within a high-availability, regulated environment as they appoint a VP Engineering to lead the next phase of technical and organisational maturity.
 



  





 The business has strong foundations, an established engineering function and meaningful scale already in place. The focus now is modernising how engineering operates across a team of ~60 engineers, with AI-native workflows, sharper execution standards and stronger operational consistency becoming central to the organisation’s future direction.
 



  





**The Role** 




 • Lead and evolve a 50-60 person engineering organisation
 



 • Establish scalable AI-assisted and agentic engineering workflows
 



 • Improve delivery quality, velocity and engineering consistency
 



 • Drive organisational and operational change across engineering teams
 



 • Partner with executive leadership on technical strategy and transformation
 



 • Raise standards around architecture, testing, deployment safety and engineering rigor
 



 • Support performance management, organisational design and selective hiring upgrades where needed
 



 • Operate effectively within a regulated, business-critical environment where stability and uptime matter
 



  





**We’re Looking For** 




 • Significant senior engineering leadership experience within complex product or infrastructure businesses
 



 • Strong technical judgement and architectural depth
 



 • Hands-on understanding of modern AI-assisted software development practices
 



 • Experience leading engineering teams through change and operational scaling
 



 • Comfortable operating across both executive strategy and engineering detail
 



 • Direct communicator with strong decision-making capability and organisational resilience
 



  





**Technical Environment** 




  





 The environment includes a modern cloud-native architecture, distributed systems, internal operational platforms and customer-facing product infrastructure across backend-heavy engineering teams.
 



  





 AI tooling and assisted development practices already exist internally, but adoption and workflows are currently inconsistent. This role exists to unify and accelerate that evolution in a structured, production-safe way.
 



  





 Reach out to April or Selina to connect ✨

title: Senior Cloud Platform Engineer | EU, Remote
description:
**About The Company**
 Our client is building a next-generation
 **Cloud Centre of Excellence (CCoE)** 
 to accelerate cloud adoption across a large, security-sensitive European environment. By developing a modern Internal Development Platform (IDP), they enable engineering teams to deliver secure, scalable, and reliable cloud solutions faster.
   

  

* Location: Remote (European Union)
* Employment Type: Contract
* Level: Mid-Senior Level
* Work Authorization: EU nationality required.


**Please note:** 
 Security clearance will be required.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We're looking for a
 **Senior Cloud Platform Engineer** 
 to become the technical expert behind our client's Internal Development Platform.
   

  

 This is not an operations or support role. You'll help shape platform architecture, develop reusable infrastructure components, advise engineering teams on cloud strategy, and drive platform innovation across a modern cloud ecosystem.
   

  

 Working alongside an experienced platform team, you'll influence architectural decisions while helping establish engineering standards for security, scalability, and reliability.
   

  

**What You'll Do**
* Design, develop, and maintain reusable infrastructure components on the Cycloid Internal Development Platform.
* Build and publish reusable service catalog components for engineering teams.
* Design, prototype, and validate new cloud infrastructure solutions.
* Ensure platform components meet security, availability, reliability, and operational standards.
* Advise engineering teams on cloud provider selection, infrastructure architecture, and platform best practices.
* Support provisioning and onboarding of new cloud environments.
* Collaborate with solution architects, project managers, and technical stakeholders to deliver scalable cloud solutions.
* Participate in Cloud Centre of Excellence initiatives and contribute to platform strategy.
* Produce high-quality operational and technical documentation.


**What We're Looking For**
* Master's degree (EQF Level 7 or equivalent).
* English proficiency (minimum B2).
* EU nationality and willingness to obtain the required security clearance.
* 10+ years of experience designing, implementing, and administering large-scale AWS or Azure environments.
* At least 1 year of hands-on experience with one or more sovereign cloud providers (Clever Cloud, STACKIT, Scaleway, or S3NS) using Terraform.
* Minimum 6 months of practical experience with Cycloid.
* Strong experience with Infrastructure as Code using Terraform.
* Experience designing reusable cloud platforms and infrastructure components.
* Proven ability to advise engineering teams on cloud architecture and infrastructure decisions.
* Excellent documentation, analytical, and problem-solving skills.


****Nice to Have****
* Experience with Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI) or IBM Cloud.
* Experience working in Cloud Centres of Excellence or Platform Engineering teams.
* Background in regulated or security-sensitive environments.
* Familiarity with ITIL or enterprise change management practices.


**What We Offer**
* Opportunity to help build a modern Cloud Centre of Excellence from the ground up.
* High-impact platform engineering role with significant architectural ownership.
* Fully remote contract within the European Union.
* Collaborative environment focused on cloud innovation, platform engineering, and modern infrastructure.


***If you're passionate about platform engineering, cloud architecture, and building secure infrastructure that empowers engineering teams at scale, we'd love to hear from you...***

title: Senior Security Infrastructure Engineer
description:
**Do you want to be at the forefront of protecting our society against cyber threats? We are looking for a Senior Security Infrastructure Engineer to team up with the most dedicated team of cyber specialists in our Secure Infrastructure domain.**
**About Truesec – A Leading Cybersecurity Company**
 Since 2005, Truesec has been a native cybersecurity company, driven by one single purpose: Creating safety and sustainability in a digital world by preventing cyber breach and minimizing impact.
   

  

 Over the years, we’ve earned the trust of organizations worldwide and gained a strong reputation internationally. Our team consists of dedicated specialists covering the entire spectrum of cybersecurity – with capabilities in Predict, Prevent, Protect, Respond, and Recover.
   

  

 Today, we employ around 400 employees – and as cybercrime grows, we need to grow. To support that goal, we are now looking for a Senior Security Infrastructure Engineer who wants to create advanced security solutions in our Secure Infrastructure Domain.
   

  

**Secure Infrastructure**
 Looking at the actual threat landscape today, it’s more important than ever to design and build infrastructure solutions that incorporate correct and relevant security features. The team works closely together using their combined knowledge and experience gathered from different projects and Incident Response cases to help our customers stay ahead of the threat actors. We continuously help customers improve their security posture within cloud, data center, endpoint management, identity, M365, and networking.
   

  

**The Role**
 The Security engineer interfaces regularly with team members and customers, determine technical requirements, feasibility of projects and expectations. You are responsible for maintaining, implementing, and designing client-facing solutions primarily in Active Directory, Entra ID, Azure and Microsoft 365 Security Solutions. This role is for someone who wants to be hands-on in a Microsoft infrastructure role leaning towards cloud but with the experience and knowledge of On-premises/hybrid environments. You must be able to think on your feet and you’ve got to want to learn and be part of a highly skilled and innovative team.
   

  

 Other responsibilities you might have can be:
   

  

* Run health and security checks on Active Directory, Microsoft 365 including Entra ID.
* Assisting our Customers with Tiering Projects.
* Provide customers with design and also assist with the actual implementation.
* Implement solutions based on Statement of Work with customers.


**Your Potential Background**
 We believe that your background probably entails 7+ years of experience and expertise within Microsoft solutions for both Cloud and On-premise/hybrid environments. You feel comfortable with guiding stakeholders towards a more secure and robust environment by giving technical recommendations that can persist the current threats present today.
   

  

 You are comfortable with guiding customers within areas such as: AD-Security, Entra ID-security, Windows Server Hardening, Azure security.
   

  

**Required Skills:**
* Active Directory Security
* Windows server Security
* Azure Security
* Microsoft 365 Security
* Overall a strong Cybersecurity competence within Microsoft Infrastructure.


**Bonus Skills:**
* Knowledge of scripting languages such as PowerShell and/or Python
* Cloud migration journeys from On-prem to Azure.
* Experience with Azure networking: Express Route, Virtual Network & Load Balancers
* Hypervisor knowledge of Hyper-V, VMware.
* Experience working with monitoring and logging tools (e.g.: Log Analytics, Azure Monitor, Azure Sentinel, ELK/ElasticSearch/Kibana)
* Experience with other cloud providers such as AWS and GCP.


*Due to the sensitivity in our assignments, we require Swedish citizenship, citizenship in an EU country, or a Swedish work permit.*
**Join Our Mission Toward a Safe Digital Future**
 If you truly want to make a difference and make our world a little bit safer, this is the place for you. At Truesec, you'll get to be at the forefront of fighting cybercrime instead of reading about it in the news. This is your chance to be part of an exciting journey in a leading cybersecurity company - and learn from some of the best in their field.
   

  

 So, are you ready to team up with the most dedicated team of experts and be part of a meaningful mission? Then we are excited to get to know you!

title: System Architect – Software
description:
*Vill du arbeta med avancerade tekniska system där din kompetens bidrar till att skapa trygghet för människor och samhällen? Hos oss spelar det du gör en viktig roll, varje dag.*
**Din roll**
 Vi söker en Systemarkitekt med mjukvaruinriktning som vill stärka vår tekniska produktledning i arbetet med att utveckla 9LV Combat System. I denna roll får du ett övergripande ansvar för mjukvaruarkitekturen inom vår globala produktportfölj och arbetar nära både system- och mjukvarufunktioner.
   

  

 Du blir en del av vårt team i Sverige och samarbetar med kollegor världen över inom 9LV-arkitekturen samt andra tekniska discipliner inom Saab.
   

  

 I rollen som Systemarkitekt kommer du bland annat att:
   

  

* Driva och vidareutveckla den övergripande systemarkitekturen för 9LV
* Säkerställa att arkitekturen stödjer produktstrategi, prestanda, säkerhet och livscykelhantering
* Vara ett tekniskt stöd till produktledning, utvecklingsteam och andra intressenter vid design- och teknikval
* Driva och förvalta arkitekturprinciper, riktlinjer och tekniska roadmaps tillsammans med teknisk produktledning och arkitekter
* Delta i och leda tekniska utredningar, förstudier och konceptlösningar mot både svenska och internationella kunder
* Samverka med andra arkitekter och systemingenjörer för att skapa skalbara, modulära och återanvändbara lösningar


 Befattningen kräver att du genomgår och godkänns enligt gällande bestämmelser för säkerhetsskydd. För vissa roller kan krav på visst medborgarskap förekomma.
   

  

**Din profil**
 Vi söker dig som har ett starkt intresse för avancerade systemlösningar och trivs i gränslandet mellan teknik, produkt och kundbehov.
   

  

 Vi tror att du har:
   

  

* Civilingenjörsexamen eller motsvarande inom t.ex. datateknik, teknisk fysik, elektroteknik eller liknande område
* Flera års erfarenhet av systemutveckling och/eller mjukvaruutveckling i komplexa system, gärna i realtids- eller säkerhetskritiska miljöer
* Dokumenterad erfarenhet av system- eller mjukvaruarkitektur, exempelvis som systemarkitekt, lead developer eller liknande roll
* God förståelse för moderna utvecklingsmetoder och miljöer (t.ex. objektorienterad design, microservices/modulär arkitektur, CI/CD och DevOps)
* Erfarenhet av arbete med större distribuerade system, integrationer och gränssnitt


 Meriterande är om du också har:
   

  

* Erfarenhet från försvars-, säkerhets- eller annan reglerad/branschstyrd verksamhet
* Kunskap om realtidsoperativsystem, inbyggda system eller nätverks- och kommunikationsprotokoll
* Erfarenhet av modellbaserad utveckling och/eller systems engineering-metodik
* Vana av att arbeta i internationella projekt och globala produktplattformar


 Som person är du:
   

  

* Strukturerad och analytisk med förmåga att se helheten och samtidigt förstå tekniska detaljer
* Kommunikativ och van att förklara komplexa tekniska frågeställningar på ett tydligt sätt
* Samarbetsinriktad och trygg i att leda teknisk dialog med flera olika intressenter
* Nyfiken, lösningsorienterad och drivande i att förbättra arbetssätt och tekniska lösningar


 Goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska, både i tal och skrift, är en förutsättning för rollen.
   

  

 Vad du blir en del av
   

  

 Bakom våra innovationer finns alla de som har gjort det möjligt. Modiga pionjärer och kluriga tänkare. Vardagshjältar och kreativa problemlösare. De som delar djup kunskap och de som utforskar nya områden. Och alla däremellan.
   

  

 Här har du chansen att påverka och bidra på ditt unika sätt. Allt från att utveckla kod och bygga imponerande försvars- och säkerhetslösningar till att ta en kaffe med en kollega. Varje bidrag räknas. Vi ger dig möjlighet att anta utmaningar och skapa smarta innovationer. I vår vänliga och tekniksmarta värld finns plats för dig att växa. Vi finns här för att tillsammans skapa trygghet för människor och samhällen.
   

  

 Saab är ett ledande försvars- och säkerhetsföretag med uppdrag att hjälpa nationer att skydda sin befolkning och bidrar till trygghet för människor och samhällen. Med 25,500 talangfulla medarbetare utvecklar Saab teknik och lösningar för en säkrare och mer hållbar värld.
   

  

 Saab utvecklar, tillverkar och underhåller avancerade system inom flygteknik, vapen, ledningssystem, sensorer och undervattenssystem. Saab har sitt huvudkontor i Sverige men en global verksamhet där Saab är en del av många nationers försvarsförmåga. Läs mer om oss här.
   

  

 Vänligen observera att vi arbetar med löpande urval och tjänsten kan komma att tillsättas innan sista ansökningsdatum har gått ut. Vi ser fram emot din ansökan!

title: Engineering Manager
description:
**WHO WE ARE** 





 At Trustly, we're building a smarter, faster, and more secure financial future by revolutionizing the world of payments. As a global leader in Open Banking Payments, we are establishing Pay by Bank as the new standard at checkout, providing unparalleled freedom, speed, and ease to millions of consumers and merchants worldwide.
 




  






 Our Ambition: To build the world’s most disruptive payment network and redefine what the payment experience should feel like.
 




  






 Trustly is a global team of innovators, collaborators, and doers.  If you are driven by a strong sense of purpose and thrive in a dynamic, entrepreneurial, and high-growth environment, join us and be part of a team that’s transforming the way the world pays.
 




  





**About the Product & Tech Organisation** 



  


  
 


  



 Our Product & Technology organisation drives the development of Trustly’s products. The cross functional teams collectively work with innovative ideas, development of products and platform and set the vision and strategy for the problem spaces they own. The Product & Tech organisation consists of a bit more than 200 people spread across Stockholm, Lisbon, Örebro, Paris, London and Izmir. 
 



  


  
 


  



 All teams consist of a product manager, an engineering manager, a lead developer and engineers. Some teams also have designers and analytics competence in the team. They all work closely together to enable new products and features within existing products within Europe and to make sure the payment platform runs without interruptions and with high performance.
 



  


  
 


  



 We are now looking to strengthen our engineering capacity within Product & Technology with one more senior position. We operate in an agile culture combined with DevOps, allowing our teams to take on full responsibility from code to on-call.
 



  


  
 


  


**About the Role** 



  


  
 


  



 As an
 
**Engineering Manager** 

 at Trustly, you will play a crucial role in leading and supporting an agile team of talented engineers. Working closely with product managers, lead developers, and other stakeholders, you’ll ensure delivery of high-quality, scalable, and reliable systems while fostering a positive and empowering team culture. This is an excellent opportunity to bridge technical excellence and people management, delivering real impact in the payments industry.
 





  




**What you'll do** 
  
* **Team Leadership** 
 : Lead, coach, and support a team of engineers, enabling them to perform at their best while fostering a culture of collaboration, ownership, and continuous learning
  
* **Delivery Excellence** 
 : Drive successful delivery of the team’s commitments, ensuring alignment with domain objectives and product goals
  
* **Technical Collaboration** 
 : Work hands-on with lead developers and engineers to design, implement, and maintain scalable systems and solutions aligned with Trustly’s technical standards
  
* **Product Partnership** 
 : Work closely with the product manager to define and prioritise the team’s roadmap, balancing short-term goals with long-term vision
  
* **Operational Ownership** 
 : Ensure your team’s systems operate reliably in production, with high performance, availability, and maintainability
  
* **Talent Development** 
 : Recruit, onboard, and mentor engineers, creating an environment where they can grow and thrive
  
* **Process Improvement** 
 : Advocate for and implement best practices in agile methodologies, DevOps, and engineering processes to continuously improve team effectiveness
  

  



  




**Who you are** 
  
* Proven experience managing engineering teams in agile environments, with a strong focus on team empowerment and delivery
  
* Hands-on engineering background with expertise in Java and experience in building scalable, robust systems
  
* Familiarity with modern tech stacks including Kubernetes, Docker, Kafka, and Spring Boot
  
* Experience working with cloud solutions (preferably AWS), monitoring, and analytics
  
* Knowledge of service-based architecture and microservices
  
* Strong ability to balance technical decisions with business needs, ensuring delivery without sacrificing scalability, performance, or reliability
  
* Committed to fostering a culture of collaboration, innovation, and excellence
  
* Passion for DevOps practices and ownership, with a track record of driving improvements in automation and monitoring
  
* Exceptional communication, problem-solving, and leadership skills
  
* Fluent in English
  

  



  




**At Trustly, you’ll have the opportunity to:** 
  
* Shape the future of payments as part of a global leader in the industry
  
* Work with cutting-edge technology and highly skilled colleagues in an agile and collaborative environment
  
* Take on a role with real impact, where your contributions directly drive the success of your team and Trustly’s mission
  
* Enjoy a supportive and dynamic culture that encourages growth, innovation, and ownership
  

  






  




  


**Our Fantastic Benefits**

 (varies by location)
 




 🌴
 **20 to 30 days of holiday** 
 to support a healthy work-life balance
 



 🥳
 **Monthly team outing allowance** 
 to enjoy social events with your colleagues
 



 👶
 **Parental leave top-up** 
 additional support for new parents
 



 🥐
 **Daily breakfast and on-site perks** 
 to make your workday smoother
 



 💚
 **Well being support** 
 our health allowance covers gym memberships, massages, and much more to help you feel your best
 



**PLUS** 
 additional benefits designed to enhance your work-life experience!
 



  





**Shape Your Role and Make an Impact**




 Join a dynamic environment where you can take ownership, drive change, and continuously embrace new challenges. We’re looking for dedicated and highly motivated individuals who thrive in a fast-paced environment and enjoy collaborating across different areas of the organisation.
 



 If your skills and experience align with this role, we’d love to hear from you!
 **Apply now and submit your CV in English.** 



  


 We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses and identifying potential inconsistencies or verification signals in application materials based on available information. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

description:

 Collaborate with stakeholders to drive solution-focused discussions
 



 Set the Data Domain Scope - describing the attributes, roles, stkaeholders.
